name: Champagne Punch
directions: Mix the juice concentrates in punch bowl (do not add water).
Stir in the Gingerale then add the Champagne (do not stir after adding the champagne!)
** Note ** The large bottles of Gingerale and Champagne should be equal volumes (I use 2 L.  bottles).

name: Zesty Punch Sipper
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large punch bowl or two large pitchers.

name: Summer Citrus Punch
directions: Combine first four ingredients in punch bowl.
Stir until sugar dissolves.
Add 50 ice cubes, orange slices, lemon slices and berries and stir gently to combine.
Fill glasses with ice.
Ladle punch into glasses and serve.

name: Lemon Sherbet Punch
directions: Mix Lemonade in very large punch bowl.
Add soda and frozen fruit.
Open  sherbet and dump the entire package of it into punch (it will float on the  top).
Due to the frozen fruit and Sherbet, there is really no need for ice until later, or unless it it very hot.

name: Raspberry Sherbet Punch
directions: Combine all together and serve.

similar.name: Awesome Sherbet Punch - Great for Baby or Wedding Showers

name: Punch
directions: Make sure all ingredients are well chilled before mixing.
Mix first 3 ingredients together and right before serving, add the ginger-ale and champagne or mineral water.
This is also pretty with an ice ring made with juice and slices of fruit.  Makes about 5 quarts    NOTE:  Guava or passion fruit juice is a nice addition.
Jan

name: Lemon Lime Punch
directions: Mix together lemonade, orange juice, pineapple juice, cold water, soda water and ginger ale. Pour into punch bowl.
Add the sherbet and stir for several minutes before serving.
Needs no ice cubes.

name: Five Fruit Punch
directions: Mix cran-raspberry drink and juice concentrate-refrigerate until time to serve.
Just before serving, pour into your punch bowl, add gingerale and champagne.
Stir gently.
This punch is good served with frozen juice ice cubes or a pretty juice fruit ring.
Fruit Ice Cubes: fill an ice cube tray with some of the fruit juice-put a cherry or raspberry or a pineapple chunk in the juice and freeze.
After they are frozen add to the punch and it will not get watered down.

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix fruit punch and sugar in punch bowl; stir.
Add 7-Up  or substitute and frozen strawberries last, stir gently.
Better  to have fruit punch chilled or a few ice cubes can be added.
Put in strawberries, still frozen, helps keep punch cool.

name: Party Fruit Punch
directions: Mix fruit punch drink mix with 2 quarts of water and add  2 cups of sugar.
Add all frozen juices.
Add crushed pineapple  and chopped cherrie  s.
Mix well or until all ingredients are  melted.
Before serving, add 8 quarts of water.
In a large  punch bowl put 2 quarts mix, 2 quarts ice, 1/2 liter of ginger  ale. Mix well and serve. Makes approximately 4 gallons;  enough to serve 100.

name: Icy Holiday Punch
directions: In a 4-quart freezer-proof container, dissolve gelatin and sugar in boiling water.
Stir in pineapple juice and cold water.
Cover and freeze overnight.
Remove from the freezer 2 hours before serving. Place in a punch bowl, stir in ginger ale just before serving.

name: Fruit Medley Punch
directions: Prepare Ice Ring, if used in advance.
In a blender container, puree straw- berries.
In punch bowl, combine pureed strawberries, apricot nectar,water, lemon juice, orange juice concentrate, and sugar; stir until sugar dis- solves.
Slowly pour in ginger ale; add Della Robbia Ice Ring, if desired.

name: Mexican Tea Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients; refrigerate until chilled.
Stir before serving.
Serve over ice.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Mix orange juice, lemonade, cranberry juice and water.
Chill.
Just before serving, add 7-up.

name: orange punch
directions: combine juices,water until mixed and smooth.
just before serving add ginger ale.
and garnish with orange slices and strawberry slices.

name: Banana Punch
directions: BRING WATER AND SUGAR TO A BOIL.
BOIL FOR 3 MINUTES AND LET COOL.
MAKE FROZEN JUICES ACCORDING TO CAN DIRECTIONS.
MIX BANANAS AND ALL JUICES TOGETHER, THEN ADD THE SUGAR WATER.
FREEZE MIXTURE.
LET THAW 2 OR 3 HOURS BEFORE SERVING.
JUST BEFORE SERVING, ADD THE 7 UP, SLOWLY.
SERVE WHILE STILL SLUSHY.
ENJOY!!

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Chill or add Ice Ring.

name: Wedding Punch with Ice Cream
directions: Combine pineapple juice, sherbet and 1/2 of ice cream.
Beat until smooth.
Add 7-up or ginger ale.
Spoon remaining ice cream into punch.
Serve immediately.

name: Sparkling Party Punch
directions: 2 quarts ginger ale 1 quart soda water combine all but ginger ale and soda water.
Chill.
Immediately before serving, add ginger ale and soda water.

name: Easy Frosty Sherbet Punch
directions: Thoroughly chill juice and ginger ale.
Empty juices and ale in large punch bowl.
Add sherbet.

name: Slushy Red Punch
directions: Dissolve jello in boiling water.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add all other ingredients, except ginger ale.
Freeze for 5-6 hours  in large container.
Remove from freezer about 2 hours before serving so punch can get to a slushy consistency.
Add ginger ale just before serving.
Makes approximately 55 half cup servings.

name: Lorisdene's Peach Punch
directions: Blend peaches, juices, and sugar in blender.
Chill.
At serving time, add gingerale.
For a slush, add vodka and then freeze.
Fill glass two-thirds full and then fill with the gingerale.

name: Sangria
directions: Dissolve sugar in water.
Slice the fruit fairly thin, add to the sugar water mixture.
Add the wine and put into the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Add the ginger ale right before you serve it.
Pour into wine glasses, put a few pieces of fruit into each glass to garnish.

name: Easy punch
directions: Mix ingredients.
Serve well chilled.

name: Sunshine Punch
directions: Put frozen juices and lemonade in pitcher.
Add cold water, stir until mixed.
Immediately before serving, add gingerale.
Stir to blend.

name: Hot Apple Cider Punch
directions: Mix ingredients together and heat in a crockpot on high until hot.

name: Delightful Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl or container, mix all juices together.
Add orange soda, ginger ale, and ice cream just before serving.

name: Fruity Sherbet Punch
directions: Combine juices in a punch bowl or large container.
Stir in ginger ale.
Top with sherbet.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Awesome Sherbet Punch - Great for Baby or Wedding Showers

name: Cranberry Cinnamon Punch
directions: In a large stainless or enamel pot combine cranberriea and 3 cups water.
Bring to a boil.
reduce to a simmer and simmer uncovered for 5 min.
Cool and pour into a blender and whirl until smooth.
Pour back into pan and add remaining ingredients except orange slices, along with 5 cups water.
Bring to a boil, reduce and simmer 5 min.
Add orange slices.
Serve hot or cold.

name: Holiday Cranberry Wine Punch
directions: Heat ingredients over very low heat for 5-7 minutes.

name: Five-Alive Punch
directions: Mix five alive with sherbet in punch bowl then add ginger ale.

name: Awesome Sherbet Punch - Great for Baby or Wedding Showers
directions: Thaw the sherbet slightly, but not until it is melted; it just makes it easier to mix up this way.
Add sherbet to punch bowl.
Add Pineapple Juice.
Add Ginger Ale (some people might prefer sprite or 7-up).
Then ENJOY.

name: Christmas Delight
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients into a large pot or container.
Tie cloves and cinnamon into cheesecloth and add to wine mixture.
Cover and chill for at least 6 hours, stirring occasionally.
Remove and dispose of spice bag.
Can be served hot or cold with an orange slice, if desired.

name: The Party Punch
directions: Mix everything together in the punch bowl, adding the orange slices and crushed ice at the end, it is delicious!

name: Family Punch
directions: Mix Kool-Aid, juice, lemonade, sugar, and water.
Add booze and ice cubes and let cool.
Add champange and ginger ale before serving.
Adjust punch to party mood with more vodka.

name: Pineapple Punch
directions: Mix the pineapple, Coconut milk and water in a large pitcher.
lightly toast the spices in a small skillet on very low heat. Just until you can smell them.
Move the whole spices to a spice grinder or a coffee bean grinder.
(NOTE: Do NOT use your coffee grinder to grind spices if you are going to use it again for coffee.The oils from the spices will ruin how your coffee tastes.).
Add the spices and sugar to the pineapple mixture and stir till combined.
If this is going to be an adult punch you can add the rum now.
If this is going to be a child friendly punch then serve it without the rum very cold.

name: Spiced Lemonade
directions: Mix spices, cranberry juice, and water in saucepan; bring to a rolling boil.
Cover, remove from heat, and let stand about 3 minutes.
Strain and discard spices.
Add sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add lemonade; mix well.
Reheat, and serve hot.
Garnish each serving with half an orange slice and a sprig of mint or a green cherry.

name: Christmas Cheer (Party Punch)
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a glass.
Add ice cubes.
To garnish, skew any prepared fruit example a strawberry with an lemon peel twists using a toothpick.

name: Hot Cranberry Sangria
directions: Heat all ingredients in a saucepan on medium low heat, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved.
When liquid is hot but not boiling, remove from heat.
Let sit 5 minutes, then strain through a fine sieve, reserving fruit.
Pour liquid into mugs or heat resistant glasses, adding reserved fruit for garnish.
(Filled with fruit and infused with warm spices, this drink is just as comforting served without the red wine).

similar.name: Hot Cranberry Tea / Spiced Cranberry Punch

name: Sangria Punch
directions: Combine nectars, wine and rum in a large pitcher.
Stir in the apples and oranges.
Salud!

name: Moms Holiday Punch
directions: Mix first 3 ingredients first.
Slowly add canada dry ginger ale.
Chill until serving time.

name: Party Punch
directions: Combine sugar, cinnamon, cloves and 1/2 cup water in a small saucepan.
Bring to boil and reduce heat.
Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
Strain out spices and discard.
Chill.
Combine with apple juice, apricot nectar and lemon juice.
Add liquor.

name: Citrus Rum Punch
directions: Prepare ice ring in advance.
Combine water and all the juice concentrates stir to dissolve and pour into a punch bowl.
Stir in the rum.
Slowly pour the carbonated water into the mix.
Place the ice ring in the punch bowl.

name: Fruity Island Punch
directions: Mix chilled juices together in large punch bowl or crock with spigot.
Add liquor and ice.
Add carbonated drinks just before serving.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Combine cranberries, water, orange rind, cinnamon sticks and cloves in large saucepan and bring to a simmer for about 30 minutes until cranberries are very soft and have started to break apart.
Strain cranberries out of liquid (this may take several strainings) and then add orange juice, lemon juice and sugar, and heat until sugar has dissolved.
Serve hot.
You may add a slash of rum or brandy if desired when serving.

name: Yellow Punch
directions: Combine all juices and water.
Add ginger ale and maraschino cherries when ready to serve, chill.

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients and stir until combined.
Float fruit slices on top.

name: Fizzy Fruit Punch
directions: Pour juice and ginger ale in large punch bowl.
Scoop sherbet into punch.
Pour into cups with making sure to get a scoop of sherbet in there.
Spike with rum when the kids are asleep!

name: Adult Party Punch
directions: Dissolve all ingredients together in large punchbowl.
Stir to melt juices and sugar.
Float fruit slices on top.

name: Itasca Punch
directions: Mix first six ingredients together.
Add ginger ale just before serving!

name: 7-Up Cranberry Punch
directions: Chill fruit juices and 7-Up.
Simmer water, sugar and cinnamon sticks together for 10 minutes.
Set aside for several hours to allow the mixture to develop the cinnamon spiced flavor.
Prior to serving time, remove the cinnamon sticks from the sugar syrup.
In a large punch bowl, combine the sugar syrup, cranberry juice, orange juice, and lemon juice.
Slowly pour in the 7-Up.
Add ice-cubes and garnish with lime slices if desired.

name: Lemon Berry Fizz
directions: Combine all in a large punch bowl.
Mix well.

name: Strawberry Cheesecake Punch
directions: In a blender combine strawberries, cream cheese and cream of coconut.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour into a punch bowl.
Stir in milk.
Spoon small scoops of ice cream into the punch.
Garnish glasses with strawberry slices.

name: Banana Brunch Punch
directions: In a blender or food processor, blend bananas, orange juice and lemonade until smooth.
Remove half of the mixture and set aside.
Add 1-1/2 cups of warm water and 1 cup of sugar to remaining mixture in blender; blend until smooth.
Place in a large freezer container.
Repeat with remaining banana mixture, water and sugar; add to container.
Cover and freeze until solid.
One hour before serving, take punch base out of freezer.
Just before serving, place in a large punch bowl.
Add pineapple juice and soda; stir until well blended.
Garnish with orange slices if desired.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Mix lemonade concentrate, strawberries and sugar in blender until well mixed.
In punch bowl, combine strawberry mix and club soda.
Add ice cubes.

name: Cheery Cherry Punch
directions: Put concentrates and undrained pineapple in blender.
Mix until smooth.
Pour into a gallon container; add water.
Chill.
When ready to serve, pour into punch bowl; add soda and ginger ale.
Drop scoops of sherbet on top.
Garnish with fruit slices if desired.

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: Mash 4 cups berries with 1/2 cup sugar.
Let stand 1 hour.
Force through strainer.
Add rest of the ingredients to chilled punch bowl.
Garnish with berries and serve.
(For large groups, I like to make a batch ahead sans ginger ale, freeze the punch in a ring mold and use that instead of ice cubes. Lemon and orange slices placed at bottom of mold and freeze well).

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix juice and soda in a punch bowl.
Add sorbets by the scoopfuls.
Enjoy!

name: Rhubarb Punch
directions: Cut rhubarb into 1" pieces.
Place in a saucepan and barely cover with water.
Cook for 10-12 minutes until soft.
Drain through sieve w/cheesecloth.
There should be 3 quarts of juice.
(If you want to make ahead, this juice can be frozen in ziplock bags for up to 3 months).
Dissolve sugar in 2 cups water and cook 10+ minutes until a syrup is made.
Combine lemon, pineapple and rhubarb juices to syrup.
Pour 1 quart of punch into ice cube trays and freeze well (a couple of days).
Remove from trays and place in ziplock bags until serving time.
Pour punch over fruit cubes in the punch bowl.
Slowly add a quart of ginger ale.

name: Apple Lemonade
directions: In blender, combine lemon juice, sugar and 1/2 cup apple juice.
Allow to stand several minutes.
Blend on low speed 30 seconds (if sugar is not completely dissolved, wait 1 minute, then repeat the process) Add 2 more cups apple juice and the ice.
Blend on low speed 30 seconds.
Pour mixture into a large pitcher and add remaining liquid.

name: Sparkling Party Punch (non-alcoholic)
directions: In the morning of your party, in a very large bowl, combine all ingredients except ginger ale; you may want to then pour this mixture into juice jugs to refrigerate to avoid any spills.

When ready to serve, place 7 cups of the punch mix in punch bowl along with 2 cups of the ginger ale; float a Citrus Ice Ring (recipe posted separately #24758) in the bowl; this allows you to refill (refresh) the punch bowl two more times without it getting too watered down as the ice ring melts.

name: Christmas Punch
directions: Pour all of the juices together in a big punch bowl.
Add enough soda to give the punch a kick, but not so much that the flavor of the juices is diluted.

name: White Wine Punch
directions: Place the raspberries in the bottom of the punch bowl.
Pour wine over berries.
Add one quart of chilled club soda.
Float slices of lemon on the surface.

name: Raspberry Float Punch
directions: Dissolve gelatin in hot water.
Add sugar, cold water and juices.
Set in cool place (but don't chill or it will set!).
When time to serve, pour into punch bowl.
Add ginger ale and frozen berries.
Stir just enough to have berries thaw a bit and break apart.

name: Sangria
directions: Combine Burgundy, mixed fruit, lemonade concentrate, granadine syrup, and ice cubes in a large bowl.
Let stand 20 minutes or until lemonade dissolves.
Stir in club soda.
Pour into glasses and top with orange slices.

name: Passionate White Sangria
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a large pitcher; chill.
Add ginger ale, stirring gently.

name: Old Fashion Lemonade Concentrate
directions: Heat the 2 1/2 c Water and sugar till the sugar dissolves.
Cool.
Grate 2 Tbsp of peel from the oranges.
Squeeze juice from the oranges and lemons.
Add juices and peel to cool syrup; pour over mint leaves if used.
Cover and steep for 1 hour.
Strain into jars; cover and refrigerate.
To serve, mix equal parts fruit syrup and water.
Serve over ice.
Garnish with fruit slices and mint leaves, if desired.

name: Party Punch Ice Ring
directions: Decoration suggestions:
Apricot halves.
mint leaves.
orange peel.
green grapes.
strawberries.
Mix ginger ale with lemon juice.
Pour 2 1/2 cups of the mixture into a 1 quart ring.
Freeze.
Arrange desired decorations on top of the ice.
Slowly, pour remaining juice mixture over the top so that you don't disturb your decorations.
Freeze -- To unmold, run cold water over the bottom; it will then slip out.
Float in the top of your punch bowl for a very pretty presentation.

name: Champagne Punch
directions: Boil sugar and water for 1 minute.
Cool.
Add all the juices and stir.
Chill and pour over ice ring/block.
At the last minute, add ginger ale and champagne.

similar.name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: Blend the first three ingredients in a blender.
Pour into a punch bowl.
Add Ginger Ale just before serving.

name: Cider Punch
directions: Mix and pour over ice block made with distilled water.

name: Banana Slush Punch
directions: Boil the sugar and water together for 5 minutes; cool.
Mash the bananas and add the pineapple and lemon juices.
Mix with the sugar water.
Place in freezer.
Can be frozen in 4 half-gallon milk cartons.
(Well-rinsed, of course) To serve, mash one container of slush with a potato masher in the punch bowl.
Pour one bottle of the Sprite over it and mix together.
Serve immediatelyslush should not be allowed to melt completely.

name: Bride's Punch
directions: Pour pineapple juice into punch bowl.
Spoon ice cream and sherbet into juice, then pour ginger ale over.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Awesome Sherbet Punch - Great for Baby or Wedding Showers

name: Strawberry Lemonade Punch
directions: Mix tea, water, lemonade, and sugar together, then add strawberries and Vodka Easy!
Do ahead (except for strawberries) Also you can put 1/2 of the punch into the blender at a time add ice and makes a Great Summertime Refresher.

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: Combine the lemonade, pineapple and strawberries in a blender. Process until smooth.
Chill until time to serve.
Add Ginger Ale before serving.

name: Holiday Punch
directions: Combine the cranberry juice,pineapple juice and orange slices,cinnamon sticks and cloves in a sauce pan.
Bring to a boil.
Strain into a heat proof punch bowl.

name: Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher or punch bowl, dissolve the sugar in the soda.
Add the other liquids, stirring well.
Slice the oranges, lemons, and limes, and add to pitcher.
Chill very well and serve over ice.
Garnish with orange wheels, pineapple slices and mint.

name: Cranberry Almond Punch
directions: Combine first five ingredients.
Stir well.
Chill.
Add ginger ale just before serving.

name: Berry-Colada Punch
directions: Combine strawberries and cream of coconut in container of an electric blender, and process until smooth; pour into a gallon-size pitcher.
Stir in pineapple juice, club soda, and rum.
Serve immediately over crushed ice.

name: Lori's Sangria
directions: Chill 1 orange and 1 lemon to use as garnish.
Combine juices from second orange and second lemon with wine and sugar and stir until sugar dissolves.
Chill.
Before serving, divide into 2 large pitchers.
Cut chilled orange and apple into wedges, and slice chilled lemon.
Divide fruit and add to pitchers of wine mixture.
Stir with wooden spoon and gradually add carbonated water.
Leave the spoon in the pitcher and mix well just before serving.

name: Summer Sparkle Punch
directions: In a large bowl or punch bowl, dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
Stir in lemonade and ginger ale.
Serve over ice.

name: Christmas Eve Punch
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients; chill.
To serve, add ginger ale, stirring well.

name: Fruit Punch for a Party
directions: In a small punch bowl or large nonmetal pitcher, combine all ingredients except ginger ale; blend well.
Add ginger ale right before serving.
You may also like to add some orange slices and marishino cherries for decoration.

name: Quantity Fruit Punch
directions: Champagne Fruit Punch: Substitute four 750-milliliter bottles of champagne or dry white wine for the ginger ale.
Combine water and the frozen concentrates; stir to dissolve.
Stir in the pineapple juice, sugar, and lime juice; stir to dissolve sugar.
Chill.
To serve, pour half the juice mix over ice in a punch bowl.
Slowly pour in 2 bottles of the ginger ale and 1 bottle of the carbonated water.
Stir gently to mix.
Garnish with oranges if desired.
Repeat with remaining ingredients when needed.

name: Raspberry Punch
directions: Place tea bags in a teapot.
Add 4 cups boiling water.
Cover; let steep 3 to 5 minutes or until the tea reaches desired strength.
Remove tea bags.
Stir in orange juice and sugar.
Place fresh or thawed raspberries in a blender container or food processor bowl.
Cover and blend or process until smooth.
Strain through a sieve or colander to remove the raspberry seeds.
Add the raspberry puree, lemonade concentrate, and 2 cups cold water to tea mixture.
Stir gently to mix.
Cover and chill in the refrigerator about 2 hours or until ready to serve.

name: Lemon Champagne Punch
directions: Mix lemonade and water and chill.
Before serving, add ginger ale and sparkling water and pour over ice cubes in a large punch bowl.
Pour chilled champagne over punch and stir gently.

name: Hawaiian Lemonade
directions: In a pitcher combine lemonade concentrate and water; add apricot nectar and pineapple juice.
Stir well.
Add ice cubes, ginger ale and lemon slices to garnish and give another quick stir.
Serve immediately.

name: Southern Tea Punch
directions: Boil water.
Add to large teapot with 5-6 teabags and fresh mint.
Steep until cool.
Add to Orange Juice.
Add sugar to taste.
Add squeeze of lemon juice.

name: Champagne Peach Punch
directions: Thaw peaches at room temperature without draining.
Blend or process peaches and juice with sugar until smooth.
Add to a 2 quart pitcher, stir in orange juice and lemon or lime juice (can be made the day before and refrigerated).
At serving time, slowly stir in champagne or sparkling wine (or pineapple juice).
Serve over ice cubes, crushed ice or double the recipe and use an ice ring.

name: Slush Fruit Cup
directions: Combine all ingredients except ginger ale; mix well.
Add ginger ale and pour into a 13x9-inch plastic pan.
Cover; freeze about 4 hours or until slush consistency.
Serve in individual clear dishes or glasses.
Garnish with a fresh slice of orange.
Do not store in a metal container.

name: Lemony Light Cooler
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in pitcher, stir until sugar dissolves.
Just before serving add club soda and fruit.
Serve over ice.

name: Very Yummy Punch
directions: Put sugar and kool-aid in a little warm water to dissolve.
Make sure it dissolves.
Mix all together well.
Add 1/2 gallon rasberry sherbert or any flavor you desire.

name: Rhubarb Punch
directions: Cover rhubarb with 1 quart water and cook until very soft.
Strain thru a cloth.
Return liquid to pan.
Add sugar, bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
Add orange juice and lemon juice.
Chill.
When ready to serve, mix with equal quantity and pour over ice.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Mix together the cranberry juice, orange juice concentrate, lemonade concentrate, and sugar, stirring until concentrates and sugar are dissolved well.
Add the 32 ounces of ginger ale and enough water to make 1 gallon of punch.
Stir gently.
Garnish with fresh cranberries and orange slices, if desired.

name: Wine Cooler
directions: Mix together wine, orange juice, lemon juice, and sugar, stirring to dissolve sugar completely.
Just prior to serving, carefully pour in club soda and stir gently.
Serve.

name: Tea Party Punch
directions: Mix together and serve.

name: Holiday Fruit and Tea Punch
directions: In a large pot, on stovetop, mix the water and the sugar; bring to a boil.
Add all of the other juices to the water and sugar mixture.
Stir well.
Pour into several small pitchers and place them in refrigerator.
Serve chilled.

name: Picnic Punch
directions: Combine the juices in a large container.
Refrigerate.
Just before serving, stir in the ginger ale and orange slices.

name: Creamsicle Punch
directions: Whip all ingredients in blender.
Serve immediately.

name: Party Punch
directions: In punch bowl, mix together lemonade and orange juice concentrates.
Just before serving, gently stir in 7-Up and grape juice, stirring gently to blend.
Garnish the punch bowl with an ice ring, if desired.
Serving size= 1/2 cup.

name: Tropical Paradise Punch
directions: Mix together pineapple juice, limeade concentrate, and rum in a non-metallic pitcher or punchbowl, stir well.
Just before serving, gently pour in club soda and angostura bitters and mix in.
Garnish with lime wedges, or other fruit, if desired.
Serve over ice or add an ice ring to the punchbowl.

name: Sun-Kissed Citrus Punch
directions: In a large non-metal pitcher or punch bowl, mix together lemonade, grapefruit, and pineapple concentrates with water.
Just before serving, gently stir in club soda and ginger ale.
Garnish with ice ring and fruit slices in punch bowl, if desired.

name: Orange-Pineapple Punch
directions: Combine first three ingredients in punch bowl.
Place scoops of sherbert in punch.
Serve punch in punch glasses or paper cups.
Duplicate recipe for additional batches of punch.

name: Strawberry Splash Punch
directions: In blender container, combine 1 1/2 cups strawberries and lemon juice; blend until smooth.
Add sweetened condensed milk and blend.
Pour into large pitcher.
Gradually stir in carbonated beverage.
Add ice if desired.
Garnish each serving with a whole strawberry if desired.

name: All Seasons Cranberry Punch
directions: Combine ingredients in a punch bowl.
Add an ice ring decorated with cranberries to keep the punch chilled.

name: Day Old Bathwater Punch
directions: About 45 minutes before serving time, set cans of lemonade and limeade and container of sherbet out to thaw.
After 15 minutes, scoop out half of the sherbet container's contents.
Mix it into a brownish color.
Return this mixture to the empty half of the sherbet container and to the freezer.
Prepare lemonades and limeade according to the can directions.
Pour into punch bowl.
Float scoops of the brownish sherbet on top of the lemonade mixture spreading it around to look like dirty brown suds.
Do not stir.

name: Apricot Punch
directions: Put apricots in blender; process until smooth.
In punch bowl, combine apricot mix with juices.
Add sugar and stir well.
Just before serving add the soda water and ice.
Float fruit slices on top.

name: Trick-or-Treat Punch
directions: THE DAY BEFORE PARTY: Fill pitcher with 3 cups water and color with green food coloring.
Pour colored water into glove; tightly secure top of glove with a twist tie.
Line baking sheet with paper towels and place glove on prepared baking sheet.
Use an inverted custard cup to elevate tied end of glove, to prevent leaking.
Freeze over night.
FOR PUNCH: When ready to serve, combine drink mix, lemonade concentrate and 4 cups cold water in a large bowl.
Stir until drink mix is dissolved and mixture is well blended.
Pour into punch bowl; add ginger ale.
Cut glove away from ice and float in punch.
NOTE: For an adult party, substitute 2 bottles of champagne for ginger ale, if desired.

name: Punch for a Bunch
directions: Put all but soda pop into serving container and chill.
When ready to serve, place half of mixture in punch bowl with ice and 2 qts of soda pop.
Use as needed.
You can add and frozen berries to the base and freeze with the base or add as it is being served.

name: Creamy Orange Sherbet Punch
directions: Mix together sweetened condensed milk and thawed orange juice concentrate in your punchbowl.
Tint with orange food coloring, if desired, or place a drop of red and slightly more yellow than red as a substitution; stir to blend.
Add the chilled ginger ale and stir gently.
Top with scoops of sherbet, and serve immediately.

similar.name: Awesome Sherbet Punch - Great for Baby or Wedding Showers

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix and pour over lots of ice.

name: Island Fruit Punch
directions: Chill all of the ingredients.
You can even freeze the pineapple and banana in chunks if you like.
Place all of the ingredients into a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Looks great in tall glasses, garnished with orange slices.
For a more colourful effect pour a little grenadine down the side before serving.

name: Orange Tea Punch
directions: In pitcher, combine tea, orange juice, lemon juice, and sugar; stir until sugar dissolves.
Chill.
Just before serving, pour tea mixture into large punch powl; add scoops of sherbet and ginger ale.

name: Perfect Punch
directions: Puree orange juice and lemonade concentrates in a blender with water.
Pour into large container.
Add pineapple juice.
Puree frozen strawberries and combine with other juices.
When ready to serve, pour half the juice mixture into punch bowl.
Add half the sherbert and half the soda.
Stir gently and serve.
When the bowl is empty repeat with remaining ingredients.

name: Refreshing Raspberry Drink
directions: Make syrup: Place raspberries in medium bowl.
Add sugar and lime juice and mash with back of wooden spoon.
Let sit for 10 minutes.
Strain mixture through fine sieve to remove seeds and set aside.
Make drink: Fill 4 large glasses with ice and pour 1/4 cup syrup in each glass.
Add 3/4 cup sparkling mineral water (or sprite).
Stir to combine.
Top with 1/2 cup sparkling water (or sprite.).
Garnish glasses with fresh raspberries or lime wedges if desired.

name: Fruity Rum Punch
directions: Prepare the concentrated fruit juices as per package directions.
Combine them in a big punch bowl.
Stir in the rum, banana liqueur and Grenadine.
Float slices of orange, lime and lemon on top or make an ice ring dropping slices of fruit into it as you freeze it.

name: Champagne Punch
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients; chill well.
To serve punch, pour juice mixture over ice ring in a large punch bowl.
Gently stir in ginger ale, tonic water and champagne.

name: Cranberry Cream Punch
directions: Prepare Cranberry Ice Ring one day in advance.
Cranberry Cream Punch: In punch bowl, combine sweetened condensed milk, cranberry juice concentrate, (liqueur and food coloring, if desired).
Just before serving, add club soda/ginger ale and ice ring.
Cranberry Ice Ring: Combine cranberry juice cocktail and water.
In 1-1/2-quart ring mold, pour 1/2 cup cranberry liquid.
Arrange cranberries and lime slices or mint leaves in mold and freeze.
Add remaining 3 cups cranberry liquid to mold; freeze overnight.

similar.name: Hot Cranberry Tea / Spiced Cranberry Punch

name: Punch for a Bunch
directions: Refrigerate all your ingredients, so to be cold.
Mix all ingredients except ginger ale.
Add ginger ale just before serving.

name: Berry Coolata Punch
directions: Process strawberries and cream of coconut in a blender until smooth.
Pour in to a pitcher.
Stir in pineapple juice and club soda.
Serve over crushed ice.

name: Sparkly Hawaiian Punch
directions: In a punch bowl or other large container combine the first 3 ingredients.
Cover and refrigerate.
Stir in ginger ale just before serving.

name: Christmas Fireside Punch
directions: In a large pot combine apple cider, lemonade and sugar; bring to a boil.
Remove from heat and stir in schnapps and rum.
Serve hot.
You can pour the mixture into a crock-pot and keep on low heat.

name: Margarita Punch
directions: Stir together the first 4 ingredients; add tequila and stir well.
Add 7-up or Sprite and mix well again.
Serve in glasses over ice.
Keep chilled.

name: Spiced Cranberry Punch
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in a saucepan; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, and simmer 10 minutes.
Remove from heat; let cool completely.
Strain, discarding cloves and cinnamon.
To serve, combine sugar mixture, fruit juices, and ginger ale in a large punch bowl.
Yield: 7 quarts.

similar.name: Hot Cranberry Tea / Spiced Cranberry Punch

name: Holiday Punch
directions: Dissolve sugar in two cups boiling water.
Cool.
Add all ingredients.
Mix well.
Serve chilled.
If using a punch bowl, freeze 1/3 of punch mixture and limes in a ring mold or in a block.
Use the frozen mixture to keep punch cold without diluting it.

name: Alaha Fruit Punch
directions: Add 1/4 cup water to ginger root.
Boil for 3 minutes and then strain.
Add the liquid to the guava, lemon and pineapple juices.
Make a syrup of sugar and remaining water and cool.
Combine the syrup with juices and pineapple.
Chill thoroughly.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Process lime juice and strawberries in blender or food processor until smooth.
Mix lime mixture, water and Equal; in pitcher.
Pour over ice cubes in tall glasses; garnish with fruit.

name: Holiday Punch
directions: In the container of an electric blender, add the strawberries.
Puree until smooth.
Pour mixture into a large punch bowl or pitcher.
Stir in pineapple juice and Sprite.
Serve immediately.

name: Cranberry-Lime Margarita Punch
directions: Combine water, cranberry juice, lime juice and sugar in punch bowl, stir until sugar dissolves.
Stir in ice cubes, ginger ale and lime, garnish with fresh cranberries, if desired.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Sangria
directions: Combine wine, cranberry juice, orange juice, liqueur, orange slices and lime slices in large glass pitcher.
Chill for 2 hours before serving.
Just before serving, pour the sangria into a punch bowl.
Slowly add the flavored sparkling water.

name: Frankye's Fruit Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients except gingerale.
Add gingerale just before serving.

name: Party Punch
directions: Prepare Jello mixture by combining jello, boiling water and cold water.
Bring to boil sugar and 4 cups warm water.
Add syrup to Jello mixture.
Add lemon juice, pineapple juice, crushed pineapple and bananas; mix well.
Pour mixture into 4 half-gallon milk cartons and freeze.
Four hours before serving, remove cartons from freezer and thaw.
Peel off carton, put chunk in serving bowl or pan and mash with masher to "slush".
Add ginger ale and serve.

name: Rosy Fruit Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine all ingredients.
Stir in sugar until dissolved.

name: Kool-Aid Punch
directions: Mix kool aids, sugar, water and pineapple juice.
Chill.
When ready to serve, add ginger ale and sherbet.

name: Orange Sherbet Punch
directions: You combine sherbet and pineapple juice in a punch bowl and stir well.
Add soda and stir until sherbet is almost dissolved.
Serve punch immediately.

name: Fruity Sangria With a Kick
directions: Stir all liquid together in punch bowl.
Add fruit.
Add ice to chill.
Serve!

name: Fruit Punch Slush
directions: Dissolve sugar in very hot water; add rest of juice.
Blend strawberries (or bananas) in some prepared juice.
Mix well.
Freeze overnight.
(I usually stir it occasionally as it is freezing).
Remove from freezer 1/2- 1 hour before serving and mix well into a slush.

name: Fruit Punch-Non Alcoholic
directions: Mix together all the liquid ingredients (except the ginger ale) and pour over the sliced fresh fruit.
Refrigerate for a few hours.
Just before serving, add the 3 bottles of ginger ale.

name: Mulled Winterberry Cider
directions: Add ingredients to a large saucepan or crockpot.
Simmer for 30 minutes.
Taste and add more spices if necessary (to your liking).
Serve warm.

name: Cranberry Punch Sparkler
directions: Mix the cranberry juice and lemonade nicely together.
Before serving, pour in the gingerale.
Serve chilled.
Enjoy this pretty, delicious and sparkling drink for New Year's and other special times!

name: Iced Tea Punch
directions: Make tea in regular manner.
Add the sugar while the tea is hot.
When cool add the juices and ginger ale.
Mix well and put in tightly closed bottles or plastic cartons in the refrigerator.
Will keep several weeks if tightly closed.

name: Sangria - Summer Favourite
directions: Mix wine, lemonade concentrate, and brandy together in large glass pitcher.
Squeeze juice from each slice of fruit into wine mixture before dropping fruit in.
Toss in cherries.
Chill.
Just before serving, add 7up.
Pour into chilled glasses and enjoy.
Don't forget to eat the fruit, especially the cherries- yum.

similar.name: Summer Spanish Sangria..get the Party Started!

name: Strawberry Wine Punch
directions: Combine strawberries, lemonade and wine in a punch bowl.
Slowly, pour in the club soda and stir gently.

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: Add lemonade concentrate, strawberries, and sugar to an electric blender container.
Cover and blend until smooth.
Pour ingredients into a punch bowl; add tea and stir to mix.
Pour in ginger ale and ice cubes if desired; I usually put ice in the individual cups and then ladle the punch into the individual cups.
Need to serve the punch immediately after adding the ginger ale.

name: Easy Party Punch
directions: Pour one or two COLD 2 liter bottles of Ginger Ale into a punch bowl.
Spoon scoops of any flavor sherbet into bowl of Ginger Ale.
Ladle into cups and enjoy.

name: Rhubarb Citrus Punch
directions: In kettle, simmer rhubarb and water until rhubarb is soft.
Cool; strain.
Measure 4 cups juice and return to kettle with the sugar.
Heat to dissolve sugar.
Chill.
Add the orange and lemon juices.
Just before serving, add ginger ale and strawberries, if desired.
Pour over ice.

name: Strawberry Sparkle Punch
directions: Puree strawberries in blender.
Pour into punch bowl.
Dissolve Jell-O* in boiling water.
Stir until dissolved.
Add to punch bowl with remaining ingredients.
Serve right away.
Or you can chill all the ingredients, except ginger ale in a covered container overnight; add ginger ale just before you serve.

name: Strawberry Sparklers
directions: Puree strawberries in a blender.
Pour cranberry juice in a pitcher and stir in the strawberry puree and refrigerate until serving time.
Pour in champagne and serve in stemmed glasses.

name: Frozen Juice Punch
directions: Mix ingredients just before serving.
Pour over crushed ice or frozen ice ring.

name: Killer Sangria
directions: Bring water to boil in medium saucepan.
Remove from heat.
Add tea bags; steep 2-3 minutes.
Remove tea bags; pour tea into pitcher.
Add sugar to taste and stir until sugar dissolves.
Cool.
(Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.) Mix fruit in bowl.
Add wine.
Fill glasses with ice cubes and serve.

name: Rainbow Fruit Punch
directions: Mix orange, lemonade and apple juice in large punch bowl.
Stir in ginger ale.
Spoon sherbert into punch bowl.
serve immediately.

name: Tea - Berry Punch
directions: Combine juices& iced tea mix in a large punch bowl.
Stir in club soda just before serving& garnish with fruit slices.

name: Frozen Patio Punch
directions: Combine ingredients and beat until fluffy in blender.
Freeze in ice cube trays.
Pour room temperature ginger ale over punch cubes.
Hint: For variation, use 2 cubes per 8 oz glass.
Pour ginger ale over cubes and add 1 oz rum.

name: BlueLagoon Punch
directions: Just pour everything in and thats it!

name: Tropical Cranberry Ginger Punch
directions: Combine liquid ingredients in a cocktail shaker.
Shake& pour into a tall glass over ice.
Garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Sangria Rose
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the orange juice, lemon juice, and sugar, stir to dissolve the sugar.
Add the remaining ingredients and stir well.

name: Raspberry Punch
directions: Mix the drink mix with the water (this will be double strength).
Add the soda.
Add raspberries if desired.
Add ice to cool.
Serve in a punch bowl.

name: Lime Slush Punch
directions: Combine the sugar and water and heat slightly till dissolved.
Add frozen limeade and juice of 5 limes.
Mix and pour into shallow pan.
Freeze.
(Can be kept in freezer up to three months.) Remove from freezer about an hour before serving and break up into a slush.
Pour into a punch bowl and add the soda.

name: The Best Punch Ever
directions: Dissolve the gelatin as directed on package.
Add sugar to the hot gelatin mixture.
Add the frozen limeade, diluted to make 1 quart.
Add the frozen lemonade, to make 1 quart.
Add pineapple juice.
Put in freezer and freeze, stirring all along.
Just before serving, add ginger ale and ice cubes if needed.
Serves about 50.

similar.name: Non-Alcoholic  Punch - Great for New Year's Eve

name: Barbados Punch
directions: Add first 8 ingredients into a pitcher; stir to combine.
Chill until ready to serve.
Serve in ice-filled glasses.

name: Shower Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, empty the Fresca and Pineapple juice.
Stir to mix the two.
Drop dollops of Lime sherbert all over the top and serve.
You may add ice cubes and recipe can be doubled.

name: Citrus-y Punch with Citrus Sherberts
directions: Mix beverages together in punch bowl, and place small scoops of sherbert on top.

name: Cranberry Orange Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine cranberry juice, lemon juice, and sugar.
Stir until sugar is completely dissolved.
Just before serving, add orange soda and liquer, if desired.
Also,add ice ring or square block of frozen ice.
Garnish with orange slices decorated with cloves and cranberries.
Stick the cloves around each orange slice by placing clove in orange rind.
I use about seven cloves per orange slice and have seven orange slices in punch bowl.
The cranberry is placed in the center of each orange slice.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, combine orange juice, tea, lemon juice and sugar.
Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Chill.
Add sauterne and liqueur.
Add ice ring or ice block and garnish with orange slices.

name: Pineapple Fruit Punch
directions: In a very large container, add the pineapple juice, sugar, and unsweetened lemonade Kool-Aid; stir until the sugar dissolves.
Add in 3 quarts of water, orange juice concentrate, and lemon juice; stir to combine.
Chill for 4 hours.
Right before ready to serve, add in the ginger ale and stir.
To make an ice ring--reserve 4 cups of punch before you chill it.
Place assorted fruit in the bottom of a 6-cup ring mold.
Pour 4 cups of punch into mold and freeze for 8 hours.

name: Orange, Lemon, Lime Sangria
directions: Mix corn syrup and orange liqueur in a large pitcher, add fruit slices and stir.
Let mixture stand 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add wine and lemon juice, stir, and chill until serving time.
To serve, add ice and club soda and garnish glasses with fruit.

name: Nat's Easy Sangria
directions: Mix the wine, O.J. and ginger ale.
Slice orange and throw inches.
Serve on ice, garnish with sliced fruit.
Note: I keep frozen berries (raspberries and strawberries) in the freezer, and often throw some of those in too!
Enjoy!

name: Slushy Punch
directions: Combine sugar, water, and Jello powder in a large saucepan.
Boil for three minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and stir in the fruit juices.
Divide mixture in half, and freeze overnight in two containers (I use two gallon-size freezer Ziplocs).

Half an hour before serving, remove one bag of slush mixture from the freezer and allow to thaw a bit (a night in the freezer will freeze it solid, you want to thaw it just enough to break it into a uniform slush once soda is added- no icebergs, please) Once mixture is broken up enough, empty bag into punch bowl and stir in one bottle of the soda until slushy.

name: Citrus Punch Concentrate Syrup
directions: In saucepan, bring granulated sugar, water, lemon and orange rinds and lemon and orange juices to boil Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 5 minutes.

Remove from heat and let syrup cool completely (can be stored in the fridge for up to two weeks in a tight sealing container) To make the punch: In a LARGE pitcher or puchbowl mix syrup and 8 cups cold water, with 4 cups of ice.
Add a sliced lemon and orange for decoration.

name: White Wine Peach Sangria
directions: Stir together wine, brandy, thawed lemonade concentrate, and sugar until sugar has dissolved.
Add fruit and chill for 2 hours, or until very cold.
Serve chilled over ice.

name: Mango Sangria
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in a pitcher.
Serve over ice; garnish w/fruit slices.

name: Tangy Party Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine the first four ingredients.
Stir in ginger ale.
Add scoops of Sherbet.
Serve immediately.

name: Cocktail Punch
directions: Combine orange and lemon juice in a large bowl.
Puree papaya and bananas in a blender.
Combine water and sugar in a pot.
Bring to a boil, stirring until sugar dissolves and a thin syrup forms.
Immediately pour this syrup onto orange and lemon juices.
Add pureed papaya and banana.
Add passion fruit.
Mix well.
Chill until required to serve.
To serve, add soda water and ice cubes.
Garnish with orange slices and mint leaves before serving.
Enjoy the punch and think of me!

name: Raspberry Wine Punch
directions: Set raspberries and their juices into a blender container, cover, and puree until smooth.
Pour berry puree into a sieve set over a bowl and strain out all the seeds (you should end up with 3/4 cup strained puree).
Mix strained puree, wine, and raspberry liqueur in a punch bowl or large pitcher.
Serve over ice.

name: Mulled Wine Punch
directions: Combine the cranberry juice, the sugars and spices in a 4 quart saucepan.
Heat to a simmer and let simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the wine and heat over low heat until hot.

name: Fruit Tea Ginger Ale Punch
directions: In a punch bowl or large container make a syrup of the sugar and tea.
Add fruit juices and enough water or more tea-- approximately 1 cup-- to make 24 cups (1 1/2 gallon).
Freeze this punch base.
Defrost and stir in ginger ale to make mixture"slushy".
Serve in a large punch bowl.

name: Ladies Punch
directions: Just before ready to serve, mix together all ingredients except for the ice cubes, cherries& oranges.
Add ice cubes.
Float orange slices and cherries on top.

name: Cranberry Brunch Punch
directions: In large container, combine all of the ingredients; stir until honey is dissolved.
Refrigerate until serving.
Garnish with a maraschino cherry or citrus slice.

name: Sangria Tea
directions: Boil water and let seep over tea bags.
Cover and brew for 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags; stir in sugar and cool.
In large pitcher, combine tea with remaining ingredients except club soda.
Chill for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, pour into punch bowl, adding ice and a splash of club soda.
Garnish with slices of fruit.

name: Summer Strawberry Punch (Alcoholic or Non)
directions: make pink lemonade according to directions on can.
add pop.
add wine (optional).
add syrup from strawberries.
mix well.
add strawberries.
using a small melon baller, scoop a couple of scoops of strawberry sherbert and add on top.
give a little stir.
Enjoy!

name: Sangria Tropical
directions: Combine the wine with the fruit, orange juice and ice in a pitcher and garnish with mint.

name: Easy Lemonade
directions: Squeeze all lemons, as much as possible, into water.
Pour all the sugar into mixture.
stir until everything is mixed up well.
Enjoy.

name: Lemonade Orange Spritzer
directions: In a large nonmetal pitcher, combine concentrates and water; mix well.
Add carbonated beverage; mix well.
Serve immediately.
If desired, garnish with lemon and orange slices.
I mix this in a 2 Gallon jug, then add ice.

name: Pina Colada Punch
directions: Mix first 3 ingredients together in a punch bowl or pitcher.
Add ice and mix well.
Add sherbet.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Delight Punch
directions: In 2 1/2 quart punch bowl, combine instant tea and water; set aside.
In blender container, combine strawberries lemonade concentrate, and sugar; process at high speed, about 15 seconds or until smooth.
Pour into tea mixture; mix well.
Serve over ice with lemon slice, if desired.

name: Best Ever Sangria
directions: In a punch bowl add- wine plus cans of juice.
Add sliced orange, lemon and lime.
Add ice cubes.
Enjoy!

name: Pina Colada Punch
directions: Prepare ice ring in advance.
Fill ring mold with water to within 1 inch of top rim; freeze.
Arrange pineapple chunks and maraschino cherries on top of ice.
Carefully pour small amount of cold water over fruits; freeze.
In blender container, combine crushed pineapple and cream of coconut; blend until smooth.
In large punch bowl, combine pineapple mixture, pineapple juice and rum, if desired.
Just before serving, add club soda and ice ring.

name: Citrus-Wine Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher or punch bowl.
Serve immediately over ice or put an ice ring in the punch bowl.

name: Jamaican Rum Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large punchbowl.
Top with lemon or lime slices, if desired.

name: Autumn Apple Punch
directions: Place apple juice in a non-aluminum kettle; tie spices in cheesecloth, add to kettle, and simmer uncovered 15 minutes; discard spice bag.
Mix spiced juice with remaining fruit juices.
Place a large block of ice in a large punch bowl, add fruit juice and ginger ale.

name: Fresh Fruit Sangria
directions: Rinse fruit; remove pits from the peach, nectarine and plum and slice thinly.
Place all fruit, including the raspberries, into the bottom of a large pitcher and pour chilled wine over the fruit.
When serving, use a spoon to place a small amount of fruit into each glass.
May be made ahead; keep covered and chilled in the refrigerator.

name: White Sangria
directions: Cut peach, nectarine, and plum into chunks.
Add all fruit to a pitcher and pour chilled wine over the fruit.
When serving, be sure to add a small amount of the fruit to each glass.
This recipe may be made ahead, just keep it covered and in the refrigerator.
The longer it sits (even overnight), the better it tastes!

name: Raspberry Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients, except ginger ale in large punch bowl.
Add gingerale just before serving.

name: Sangria Slush
directions: Several hours before serving: Blend pineapple, red wine, orange juice, lemon juice and sugar in a blender at high speed for about 20 to 30 seconds.
Be sure all sugar is dissolved.
Pour mixture into a 9 X 9 inch baking pan or something similar.
FREEZE mixture in the freezer.
When ready to serve, take pan from freezer and let stand at room temp until softened.
Stir with a spoon until semi-thawed then spoon into wine glasses.
Garnish with lemon peel, if desired.

name: Tropical Party Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, bring the water and sugar to a light boil; cook and stir for 2 mins.
Pour into a large container.
Add pineapple juice, concentrates and extract.
Cover and freeze.
Remove from freezer 1-2 hours before serving.
Just before serving, mash the mixture with a potato masher and stir in lemon-lime soda.

name: Rum Punch
directions: Mix in punch bowl.
Add large block of ice and decorate with fruit.
Makes 28 (5 oz.) drinks.

name: Vodka Punch
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in punch bowl.
Slowly add 7-Up.
Add ice and serve.
Makes 28 (4 oz.) drinks.

name: Cranberry Holiday Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, heat juice concentrate, water, honey, cinnamon stick, cloves and cardamom pods until mixture boils.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in wine and liqueur; heat thoroughly but do not boil.
Serve hot in mugs with a small stick of cinnamon.

name: Potent Punch
directions: I mix everything except the ice cream in a bucket then fill a punch bowl as needed top with ice cream.

name: Tequila Lime Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine the water, tequila, Midori, juice concentrate, lime juice, and sugar.
Slowly and carefully pour the carbonated 7-Up or Sprite down the side of the bowl, then stir the punch gently to mix.
Float the lime and orange slices on top of the punch and serve over ice.

name: Banana Slush
directions: In a large non-metal container, combine mashed bananas and juices; mix well and freeze.
Two hours before serving, remove frozen mixture from freezer; let stand at room temperature.
Just before serving, stir carbonated beverage into slushy fruit mixture.
Serve immediately.

name: Delicious Cranberry Punch
directions: In a large container, combine all ingredients (adding more sugar if desired), stir until sugar is dissolved.
Refrigerate until serving.
Serve warm or cold.

name: Fruity Punch
directions: Make lemonade ice cubes first, freeze for an hour-ish.
Combine all other ingredients, chill for same amount of time as ice cubes.
Serve w/ice cubes and a lemon slice (opt. garnish).

name: Sparkle Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients except champagne in a punch bowl over ice.
Add champagne just before serving.

name: Cranberry Wassail
directions: Wrap spices in cheesecloth and tie off with kitchen twine or place in tea ball.
Mix together all ingredients except wine and cinnamon sticks and stir until sugar dissolves.
Simmer mixture until warmed, about 10 minutes.
Add wine and heat through.
Serve warm garnished with cinnamon stick, if desired.

name: Festive Holiday Punch
directions: Pour apple and cranberrie juices into punch bowl.
Fifteen minutes before serving, add apple slices, cranberries, soda and ice.
Do not stir.

name: Champagne Punch (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: The night before, or sooner, place the apple juice in the ice ring mold and fill with water.
If you want your ice ring to last longer 1/2 the apple juice and the rest water as juice tends to take less time to thaw.
To serve, mix rest of ingredients in punch bowl and add ice ring.

name: champagne punch
directions: mix all except sherbert, then add it on top.
let mix a few minutes, then serve.

similar.name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)

name: Party Punch
directions: Place all ingredients in large punchbowl.
Serve.

name: Slushy Lemonade
directions: In blender, combine lemon juice concentrate, water, and sugar.
Gradually add the 4 cups of ice cubes, blending until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Quick Cranberry Punch
directions: Mix lemonade concentrate& water in large punch bowl.
Stir in cranberry juice cocktail.
Just before serving, stir in ginger ale.
Ice cubes that may have strawberries frozen into them or maybe pineapple, its up to you.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Punch (Non Alcoholic)
directions: Fill a large glass with ice cubes and add the juice& soda water.
Decorate with the orange slice and the mint.
Serve.

name: Punch
directions: Dissolve jello in boiling water.
Add sugar,pineapple juice and the 12 c. of water.
Put into containers in the freezer.
Do this several days before using.
About 4 hours before using take from the freezer and let thaw.
Just before using add 4 qt. ginger ale.

name: Eggnog Orange Punch
directions: In a pitcher, stir eggnog and orange juice concentrate until well mixed.
Pour in ginger ale and stir gently.

name: Lime Sherbet / 7-Up Punch
directions: Pour Seven Up into punch bowl.
Float scoops of lime sherbet on top.

name: Anytime Slushy Punch
directions: In large bowl or pot mix first three ingredients together until dissolved.
Stir in frozen lemonade and pineapple juice.
Place in two freezer bags and freeze over night.
Take out of freezer two hours before serving time.
Place one bag in punch bowl and add half of ginger ale.
Break up big chunks of frozen mixture.
Punch will become slushy.
Ready to serve.

name: Citrus Cooler
directions: Combine first 5 ingredients; mix well.
Place in the refrigerator to chill.  Just before serving, add sparkling water and stir.

name: Gin Punch
directions: Combine the water and sugar in large saucepan.  Bring to boil and stir until dissolved; cool.
Combine sugar mixture, juices and cherries, chill.
Add gin and ginger ale just before serving.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: Combine all juices with water.
Stir to dissolve.
Chill.
Add at serving time: chilled 7 Up& ice ring.
Top with scoops of sherbert.

name: Hot Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients and simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve hot.
**Iput mine in the croc-pot and let everyone serve themselves.

name: Sparkling Grape Punch
directions: In a saucepan, combine water and sugar.
Bring to a boil; boil for 3 minutes.
Cool.
Add juices and mix well.
Stir in ginger ale just before serving.

name: So Simple Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl combine drink mix, pineapple juice, sugar and water.
Stir until dissolved.
Just before serving, stir in the ginger ale.

name: The Ultimate Champagne Punch
directions: Fill punch bowl with ice.
Add pineapple juice and about 10 scoops of sherbet.
Add champagne and ginger ale.
Stir and serve!
(Replenish sherbet as it dissolves, as needed).

name: Rhubarb Lemonade Punch
directions: Put rhubarb, lemonade concentrate, water and sugar into a large, nonreactive saucepan; heat to simmer over medium-high heat; reduce heat to low; cover, cook until rhubarb is very soft, about 20 minutes.
Press mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a pitcher; discard pulp.
Refrigerate until chilled, at least 2 hours.
Pour rhubarb mixture over ice in a small punch bowl; slowly pour in lemon-lime soda and serve immediately.

name: Banana Punch With Strawberries
directions: Beat in blender 5 bananas and some of the juice.
Add remaining juice and lemonade.
Set in freezer in your punch bowl till crystals form.
Pour in the 2 liters of 7up and top with strawberries just before serving.

name: Sparkling Pineapple Lemonade
directions: Stir together sugar and the juices until the sugar is dissolved.
Put in the pop bottle.
(I use a funnel).
Slowly pour in the ginger-ale.
Screw on the cover and LIGHTLY shake bottle to blend everything.
Keep refrigerated, or serve on ice.

name: Sparkling Citrus Refresher
directions: Combine juice concentrates, pineapple juice, and water in a large container.
Mix well.
Gently stir in gingerale.
Use a funnel to put in 2 litre pop bottles to keep in fridge.
If using in a punch bowl, do not add gingerale until ready to serve.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: In two large pitchers or a large punch bowl, combine the first 6 ingredients. Gently stir in soda.
Serve immediately.

name: Summer Sangria & Classic Sangria
directions: Summer Sangria.
In a large chilled pitcher, combine the sugar, orange liqueur, brandy and white wine.
Cover and refrigerate for 2 1/2 hours.
When ready to serve slowly stir in club soda to taste.
Add all the fruit and ice cubes and ENJOY.
Classic Sangria.
In a large chilled pitcher, combine the red wine, orange and lemon slices, triple sec and brandy with 1 tbsp of sugar.
Cover and refrigerate for 1 1/2 hours.
Before serving add club soda and ice, taste and adjust sugar or soda as preferred.

similar.name: Summer Spanish Sangria..get the Party Started!

name: Holiday Party Punch
directions: Combine boiling water and honey, stirring to dissolve.
In a large punch bowl, combine cranberry, orange and lemon juices.
Stir in the honey mixture.
Just before serving, add the giner ale.
Serve on ice with sliced fruit as garnish.

name: Watermelon Champagne Punch
directions: For ice mold, place orange sliced in the bottom of a bundt pan or other decorative mold; pour juice over slices; freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.
Scoop 3 cups of melon balls from watermelon, using the small end of a melon baller.

Place melon balls in a plastic bag; refrigerate until serving time; cut remaining watermelon flesh into chunks; place in a blender, add sugar and lime juice; process in blender or food processor until smooth; press through a fine mesh strainer; refrigerate in an airtight container until ready to serve.
Remove ice ring just before serving by dipping the bottom of the mold in a sinkful of hot water for about 12 seconds; invert over a plate to unmold, gently slide the mold into punch bowl.

Pour in half of the chilled puree; pour in champagne from 2 bottles; garnish with melon balls, reserving some for individual punch glasses; replenish the punch with remaining puree and champagne as needed.

name: Banana Party Punch
directions: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan; cook, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves.
Cool completely.
Puree bananas in an electric blender until smooth.
Combine bananas, dissolved sugar mixture, juices and lemonade in a large freezer container (a plastic 1-gallon milk carton works well).
To serve, thaw until slushy.
Pour into a punch bowl; gently stir in 7 UP.
Serve immediately.

name: Sweet and Tangy Lime Slush Punch
directions: Dissolve sugar and gelatin in boiling water in a large bowl; stir in juices and cold water.
Cool slightly.
Pour into a large freezer ziplock bag and freeze at least 8 hours.
Remove from freezer 1 hour before serving.
Place in a punch bowl and break into chunks.
Add ginger ale; stir until slushy.

name: Strawberry Banana Fruit Punch
directions: In a punch bowl or large container, combine pineapple juice, orange juice concentrate, lemonade concentrate, 1/2 cup water and sugar.
Place bananas, strawberries and remaining water in a blender; cover and process until smooth.
Stir into the juice mixture.
Cover and refrigerate.
Just before serving, stir in ginger ale.

similar.name: Fluffy Orange, Banana, and Strawberry Punch

name: Kiwi- Strawberry Lemonade
directions: squeeze the kiwi and strawberries into a cup.
use a lemon squeezer to squeeze the lemons.
add 1/2 cup water.
add the sugar and stir (if too sour or sweet add a little more water.).

name: Island Punch
directions: Bring water to a boil.
Add the sugar and boil until it becomes a syrup.
Let cool.
In a punch bowl combine lemonade, orange juice, ginger ale, and carbonated water.
Mix in the sugar syrup.
Add ice and sherbet.
Just before serving add cherries and cherry juice and float orange slices on top.

name: Awesome Slush Punch
directions: mix all ingredients well, except the 7-Up, then freeze for at least 12-14 hours or until frozen.
Then serve in punch bowl.
Pour cherry 7UP in until slushy.
(If your punch bowl is smaller, feel free to split in half- this makes a lot of punch).

name: Hot Cranberry Perk Punch
directions: Pour juices and water into percolator.
Place spices and sugar in basket.
"Perk”as you would coffee.
Ingredients can probably be simmered on the stovetop if you don't have a percolator.

name: Non-Alcoholic  Punch - Great for New Year's Eve
directions: In a large punch bowl mix ginger ale and orange juice.
Place sliced oranges on top of punch and arrange the cherries on top of the orange slices.

name: Boo Punch
directions: Stir together apple cider, orange juice, pineapple juice, and sugar in soup tureen or large bowl.
Pour in ginger ale.
Add ice cubes.
Garnish w/sliced oranges/and or apples.

name: Very Berry Punch
directions: Puree strawberries in food processor or blender.
Pour into a pitcher.
Stir in pineapple juice and soda.
Serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh strawberries, if desired.

name: Apricot Mist Punch
directions: Combine Apricot nector, pineapple juice, and concentrate in punch bowl.
Stir in ginger ale.
Add ice ring with lime slices etc.

name: Punch for 40
directions: Mix everything but the bananas.
Put in punch bowl to serve.
Add 6- 6 sliced bananas, if desired.

name: Holiday Cranberry Punch
directions: place slices of orange and lime in bottom of large punch bowl.
mix all punch ingredients together pour on top.
Serve ice cold.
TIP: To prevent the punch from being watered down make ice cubes with punch instead of water.
The punch will stay cold without being watery.

name: Christmas Sparkle Punch
directions: Mix all in except Champagne in punch Punch Bowl over ice.
Add Champagne to the punch bowl just before serving to preserve it's sparkling fizz.

name: Punch for a Big Party
directions: Chill all ingredients well before the party.
Using a large cotainer, mix all ingredients except sparkling wine, fruit salad, ice.
Add these ingredients just as you serve it.

name: Killer Sangria
directions: An hour before serving:
Pour the wine into a large container (a large cooking pot will do).
Add sugar until the wine tastes as sweet as you desire.
Add the vodka, brandy, and orange juice, stirring well.
Add the sliced fruit and stir to mix.
Just before serving:
Add the Seven-Up, stirring gently.
Add ice cubes to chill.

name: White Christmas Punch
directions: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat.
Stir in evaporated milk and almond extract.
Allow to cool.
Chill until ready to serve.
Combine ice cream, milk mixture, and lemon-lime beverage in a large container just before serving.
Stir gently, breaking the ice cream into small pieces.
Transfer punch into a punch bowl.
Recipe may be halved for smaller gatherings.

name: Holiday Punch  Crock Pot Cider
directions: Combine all ingredients in crock pot except for the booze.
Heat on high for 2 hours, then keep warm on low.
Just before serving add booze if you want.
Adding water if needed.
Enjoy!
Happy Holidays!

name: Teatotaler's Sangria
directions: In a 21/2 quart glass container, combine the orange and lemon slices, lime wedges and seasonal fruit.
Pour the brewed green tea, cranberry-peach juice, and pineapple juice into the container.
Just before serving, stir in the grape juice and float the frozen peach slices on top.
Try to get some fruit with each serving.

name: Festive Hot Cider
directions: Combine cider, cranberry juice, water, cinnamon, allspice, cloves, cardamom pods,& vanilla bean into slow cooker.
Cook on low heat for 2-4 hours.
Garnish with orange slices, if desired and fresh cranberries for a more colorful celebration.

name: Cuban Sangria
directions: Wash and cut the fruit into small chunks.
You do not need to peel the fruit, just wash and chunk.
Place the cut fruit pieces into a large cooler (we buy the Styrofoam disposable coolers with the lid).
Pour the full contents of the red wine and rum over the fresh fruit, mixing and stirring.
Cover the cooler and let sit for at least 24 hours in a dark cool place.
(This is the hard part.).
Serve the mixture by spooning out with a ladle into cups with the fruit and liquid.
Can be poured over ice, but is equally as good straight from the cooler.

name: Cherry, Berry Punch
directions: Place all ingredients into a pitcher or a punch bowl with a generous amount of ice cubes.
Enjoy.

name: Mardi Gras Madness Punch
directions: Place ice ring in bottom of punch bowl.
Add liquids in order given.
Float slices of oranges and limes on top.

name: Red Wine Punch
directions: Mix the first 3 ingredients together, using equal amounts of each.
Put in the fridge to chill.
If making punch freeze some of the leftover ginger ale to use as an ice ring in the punch bowl.
If using ice ring put it in the punch bowl.
Pour punch into bowl.
Squeeze half the lime over top of the punch.
May slice and float lime slices in bowl if desired.

similar.name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)

name: Cranberry Christmas Punch
directions: Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water.
Stir in the lemonade.
Add the cold water and cranberry juice.
Place 2 ice cube trays in largte punch bowl.
Pour punch on top over the ice.
Pour chilled ginger ale inches.

name: Margarita Punch
directions: Combine the concentrates, powdered sugar, and crushed ice in a large freezer proof container.
Cover tightly and freeze for at least one hour (or for many days depending on how early you're planning ahead).
Place the frozen mixture into a large punch bowl.
Slowly pour in the soda and add the lime and/or lemon slices.
Serve in chilled (salt rimmed optional) glasses.

name: Slushy Rhubarb Punch
directions: Bring the rhubarb and 4 cups water to boil.
Simmer, uncovered, 5-8 minutes, till rhubarb is soft.
Mash rhubarb and press through sieve to remove pulp.
Discard pulp.
To the rhubarb juice add the sugar, 3 cups water, orange juice and lemonade concentrates.
Freeze till solid, about 4 hours.
Thaw about 45 min-1 hour before serving.
Scraping slush off the top as it thaws, place equal amounts of slush and 7up in each glass.
Stir and serve.

name: Annes Fruit Punch
directions: Mix cranberry juice, pineapple juice, sugar and almond extract.
Chill.
Add Ginger ale when ready to serve.

name: Tropical Fruit Punch
directions: Combine fruit punch, fruit juice concentrates and water.
Pour over ice in punch bowl.
Chill.
At serving time, slowly pour ginger ale down side of punch bowl.
Mix gently.
Float orange and lime slices.

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients, except lemon-lime soda, together and keep chilled in the refrigerator.
Add 7-up right before serving.
Serve cold.

name: Persian Fruit Punch
directions: Squeeze the fruit juice into a pitcher, add sugar and water and stir.
Add optional concentrated tea.
Serve over ice.

name: Raspberry Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, mix together pineapple juice, lemonade, sherbet and ginger ale.
Stir in undrained, thawed raspberries.
Add ice if desired.

name: Fruit Punch - Non Alcoholic
directions: Pour all ingredients into large punch bowl. Punch can be made earlier than required but Soda Water and Ginger Ale to be added just before serving.Enjoy!
The recipe requires lemon cordial, not lemons, but for some reason it won't let me put 'lemon cordial' in the ingredients.

name: Sangria
directions: In a bowl, muddle the orange and lemon slices with the sugar with a wooden spoon.  Add the red wine, cognac, cointreau, and orange juice.  Stir until sugar is dissolved.  Transfer to a punch bowl, chill until ready to serve and then stir in club soda and add ice cubes.

name: Pink Party Punch
directions: Mix and float a frozen ring of the mixture to keep it chilled.

name: Aloha Fruit Punch
directions: Add 1/4 cup water to ginger root. Boil 3 minutes. Strain.
Add the liquid to the guava, lemon and pineapple juices.
Make a syrup of sugar and remaining water. Cool.
Combine with juices and pineapple. Chill throroughly.

name: Fruity Tea Punch
directions: Dissolve the sugar in the hot tea.
Stir in the juices.
Pour over a large block of ice (or ice ring made in a jello mold).
Just before serving add the 7-up and garnish with mint leaves or fruit slices.

name: Slushy Fruity Kool-Aid Punch
directions: Boil the sugar and 4 cups water together to make a simple syrup.
Remove from heat and add the next 4 ingredients.
Divide this mixture into 5 empty and clean gallon milk jugs.
Fill the cartons to near the top with water and store in the freezer (it stays slushy) or chill in the refrigerator.

name: Berries & Champagne Punch
directions: Combine all in a large punch bowl or if you don't have one, combine it all in a large clean pot and serve it in pitchers.
Add the frozen fruit just before serving. The mint can be left in the punch bowl or removed just before serving but it adds a wonderful flavor so don't leave it out.

name: Sparkling Citrus Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients in punch bowl.
Serve over ice.
Tip: Freeze fruit with juice or sparkling water in mini-bundt pans and use as ice for a colorful garnish!

name: Kid's Sparkling Soda Sangria
directions: Place the fruit slices in a pitcher, then pour in the juice and the soda.
Serve in tall glasses with ice.

name: Lemon Strawberry Punch
directions: Prepare lemonade according to directions on can.
Blend in mashed strawberries and soda.  Serve over crushed ice.

name: Lemon Refresher
directions: Beat sugar and lemon juice on high speed for 3 minutes or until sugar is partially dissolved.
Gradually add milk, beating constantly on high.
Stir in lemon extract and lemon peel.
Transfer this lemon/sugar mixture to serving pitcher.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Just before serving, gently stir in soda.
Best served over ice.
This could possibly be made with Splenda, and also might be tasty with orange juice/extract instead of lemon.
Let me know you're thoughts!

name: Raspberry Lemonade
directions: Defrost raspberries saving their juice and discarding the berries.
Mix all ingredients and pour back into pop bottle to keep carbonation.
We like to freeze it into a slush.
Prep time does not include defrost time.

name: Citrus Slush
directions: in a 6 quart dutch oven over high heat, bring sugar and 3 cups of water to a boil.stirring till sugar dissolves.remove from heat, stir in frozen orange juice and lemononade concentrate until melted.
Stir in pineapple juice and 3 cups cold water until well blended.
Pour into 2  13x9" pans, cover and freeze overnight --
Cut each pan of frozen juice squares into 24 pieces --
Place squares in a 2 gallon punch bowl, slowly pour chilled 7-up over, stir until punch  is slushy --
Ladle into glasses -- garnish with a lime wedge.

similar.name: Sweet and Tangy Lime Slush Punch

name: Shortcut Banana Lemonade
directions: Peel and mash bananas well with a fork in a bowl.
Pour in lemonade and beat with an electic mixer until well blended.
Stir in cold water and chill.
Serve in tall glasses with ice cubes.

name: Easy Punch
directions: Combine the lime juice and orange juice with the sugar.
Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the Fresca and serve over ice.

name: Hurricane Punch
directions: Stir together all ingredients.
Serve over ice.
A frosted glass is nice.

name: Different Tea Punch
directions: Bring 8 cups (2 quarts) freshly drawn cold water to a full rolling boil in a large saucepan. Remove from heat.
Immediately add the tea bags and brew for 4--5 minutes.
Combine remaining ingredients EXCEPT SODA in a very large container or bowl, making sure to strain the citrus juices for any pulp.
Stir the tea and add it to the bowl of juice mixture.
Just before serving, pour tea/juice mixture into a punch bowl over an ice ring or ice cubes.  Add ginger ale/soda and stir to mix.

name: Emerald Punch for a Crowd
directions: Combine sugar and water, bring to a boil and stir to dissolve sugar.  Remove from heat and stir in Jello.  Cool.

Add jucies, mint extract if using, and water to desired strength. (I suggest tasting it first after adding about 1 cup of water.  If it is too sweet for you, add some more water until it tastes right.).
Add ginger ale just before serving.
Green food coloring may be added before serving if you like.  This makes it festive for St. Patrick's Day, Christmas, New Year, or any other party that you can think of where green would look nice.
Note:  You can use any flavor of Jello you like--strawberry, cherry, lemon, etc. and omit the mint extract if desired.  Use an appropriate food coloring.

name: Easy Party Punch
directions: Dissolve powders and sugar in water.
Add frozen concentrates and stir well.
Add gingerale just before serving.

name: Water Punch
directions: Mix and refrigerate. Serve with ice.
Lemon/lime slices add color.

name: Raspberry Punch
directions: Mash thawed raspberries or strawberries with a fork or potato masher.
Mix berries with orange juice, lemonade and water.
Just before serving, pour fruit mixture over ice and add club soda.

name: Banana Punch
directions: In a blender, blend bananas,  orange juice, and lemonade until smooth.  Remove half of the mixture and set aside.
Add 1 1/2 cups of water and 1 cup of sugar to mixture in blender;  blend until smooth. Place in a large freezer container.  Repeat with remaining banana mixture, water, and sugar; add to container.
Cover and freeze until solid.
One hour before serving, take punch base out of freezer.  Just before serving, place in a large punch bowl.  Add pineapple juice and soda; stir until well blended.
Garnish with orange slices, if desired.

name: Banana Punch
directions: Bring water and sugar to a boil in a dutch oven, stirring until sugar dissolves.

Remove from heat; stir in pineapple juice, orange juice concentrate, lemon juice and bananas.  Pour into a 2 gallon container, such as an ice cream bucket. Freeze 2 hours or until firm.  Let stand at room temperature 45 minutes before serving.
Pour ginger ale over banana mixture, stirring until slushy.
Serve immediately.

name: Red Hot  Punch
directions: In a large pan place sugar, water, and candies.  Heat until candies are melted.  Set aside and cool.
Mix together pineapple juice, lemonade, water, and ginger ale.
Serve with ice immediately.

name: Ginger Ale Citrus Cooler
directions: In large saucepan, cook and stir the sugar and water over low heat until sugar is dissolved. Bring to a boil; boil for 5 minutes. Cool.
Stir in grapefruit juice and orange juice. Cover and refrigerate until chilled. Just before serving, stir in the ginger ale and cherry juice.

name: Fresh Berry Sangria
directions: Wash berries.
In a pitcher, combine all berries, Splenda, and cranberry juice. Let sit 1 hour.
Stir in wine and sparkling water to make as bubbly as you like.
Serve chilled.

name: Key West Sangria
directions: Mix Five-Alive, Fresca, and wine together in a large pitcher.
Stir in fruit slices and lots of ice.
Stir well and serve.

name: Citrus Sangria
directions: Dissolve sugar in water.
Combine the sugar mixture with wine, port, orange and lime slices and pineapple cubes in a large glass, ceramic or stainless-steel container.
Add ice before serving.

name: Yucatan Sangria
directions: Combine merlot, port, lemonade, water and sugar. Stir well.
Mix in fruit.
Add ice before serving.

name: Sangria Blanco
directions: Mix sugar, water, and cinnamon stick together.
Add fruit, wine, and club soda to sugar mixture, and remove cinnamon stick.
Add ice before serving.

name: Margarita Punch
directions: Combine first 8 ingredients in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil; remove from heat and let cool.
Pour mixture into a pitcher; add 1 quart chilled water.
Serve over ice, and, if desired, add 1 to 2 tbsp of tequila to each serving.

name: Yummy Fast Punch
directions: Throw all the frozen stuff in a pitcher.
Add the OJ and stir well.
Add the lemon-lime and stir lightly, careful not to ruin the fizz.
Substituting is fine- I think as long as there's a citrus and non-citrus it'll turn out pretty well.
Also, a little vodka or rum can improve it, depending on your mood.

name: Pacific Sparkler Punch
directions: Combine the fruit juices in your punch bowl.
Stir to dissolve limeade concentrate.
Just prior to service, add the soda.
Add ice and garnish with fruit slices, as desired.

name: Our Christmas Punch
directions: Place the ice in a large punch bowl.
Add the juices and mix well.
Add the 7-Up and Cranberry juices slowly to keep the fizz. Merry Christmas!

name: Rum Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Serve over ice.

name: Frozen Cranberry Punch
