directions: Combine all ingredients in a large plastic (freezeable) container or ice cube trays (I used a plastic pitcher).
Cover and freeze.
To serve, spoon into wine glasses or goblets.

name: Winter Spiced Sangria
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher, stir until sugar dissolves.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
Remove cloves and cinnamon sticks before serving. Serving size: 3/4 cup.

name: Festive Apple Cider
directions: Using cheesecloth, make a bundle of the cloves, allspice, cinnamon sitcks and orange peel.
Place in a large pot and add the apple cider.

Bring cider and spices to a boil over high heat.  Reduce heat to medium and cook for about 15 minutes or until the cider is reduced to about 4 cups.  Remove and discard the cheesecloth bundle of spices.
Stir in the remaining ingredients and simmer until it is heated through.
Serve warm.

name: New Year's Eve Punch
directions: Mix ingredients in a punch bowl and serve immediately.
This doesn't save, so drink it all up!

name: Orange Dreamsicle Punch
directions: Mix the orange drink and seven up in a punch bowl.
Add scoops of orange sherbet and ice cubes.
Stir well and serve.

name: Authentic Spanish Sangria
directions: Note: Because of the large volume I suggest making this in batches. This is one reason for the vagueness of the measurements.
Mix the wine with 3/4 cup sugar. Set rest of sugar to the side.
Add Liquors and stir.
Slowly add 1/2 ltr lime seltzer and stir.

Taste now and add any ingredients to taste. There SHOULD be a bit of a liquor bite to it, but it should NOT be overpowering. Likewise it should be sweet but not send you into a diabetic coma. It should also have a decent fizz to it, if it's too thick, add seltzer. Just experement.

Once you've got the taste you want, add the slices of fruit. I've found that the sangria i get in America tends to be loaded down with fruit. Remember that it's more of a garnish and only adds a bit of flavor. If you need a ton of fruit to get the desired flavor, you haven't got the right mixture.
Have fun experementing, and enjoy it. It's perfect for summer days and bbqs.
For another great (and much simpler) spanish drink check out my recipe for Tinto de Verano.
Chau.

similar.name: Summer Spanish Sangria..get the Party Started!

name: Mixed Fruit Punch
directions: Combine water and sugar in medium saucepan. Bring to a boil and boil 5 minutes. Cool.

Pour sugar syrup, lemonade, apple juice, cranberry juice, orange juice and tea over a block of ice in a punch bowl. Stir to blend. Makes about fifty (4-oz.) servings. Garnish with slices of lemon and orange.
Margo Oliver’s Most Treasured Recipes.

name: Banana Punch
directions: Boil water and sugar until dissolved.
Blend 2 lemons, peeled and seeded with bananas.
Mix all ingredients together except the 7-Up and freeze.
Thaw on counter to slush consistency and add both 2 liters 7-Up.

name: Puerto Rican Rum Punch
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the lime juice and sugar and stir briskly until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the rum, orange liqueur and grenadine and chill the rum mixture for about 1 hour.
Just before serving, add the sparkling wine and pineapple chunks and serve in punch glasses.

name: Sparkling Lemonade
directions: In medium saucepan over high heat, bring water and sugar to a boil. Boil for 1-2 minutes or until sugar is dissolved. Allow to cool, then put in a covered container in fridge.
Fill a pitcher with ice and add syrup mixture, juices and club soda. Stire, add lemon and lime slices to garnish.
Serve immediately.

name: Columbian Punch
directions: Combine the rum, brandy, Chartreuse, juices and tea in a large punch bowl.
Add the sugar and stir until dissolved.
Add ice  then add the Champagne and stir.
serve.

name: Frozen Punch
directions: Dissolve sugar in cranberry juice.
Add remaining ingredients and stir.
Freeze.
Remove from freezer 2 hours before serving.

name: Wedding Punch
directions: Mix first 4 ingredients in a punch bowl.
Add gingerale just before serving.

name: Sparkling Limeade (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: *NOTE: Whirl the sugar in a mini-chopper or blender until finely ground. Basically, you've just prepared "superfine" sugar at a fraction of the cost.
In a small saucepan over medium heat combine the sugar and water. Cook, stirring until sugar is dissolved and liquid is clear. This should take only 2-3 minutes.
Transfer liquid to a pitcher and allow to cool.
Once cooled, stir in lime juice. Stir well.
Fill a large pitcher with ice cubes, pour in the simple syrup and the seltzer water.
Stir well and serve!

name: Sunny Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in 4-quart container. Mix well.
Refrigerate 2 to 3 hours hefore serving.

name: Sunny Citrus Punch
directions: In a large pitcher combine lemon juice, lime juice and sugar.
Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Stir in orange juice.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Add club soda and ice cubes.
Serve right away.

name: Caribbean Punch
directions: Mix honey and juices together. They will mix well if both are at room temperature.
Chill for 3 hours or overnight.
Before serving add rest of ingredients.
Pour over lots of ice.
Garnish with citrus slices.

name: Raspberry Citrus Punch
directions: Force raspberries through a sieve to remove seeds.
Combine sugar and water in saucepan.
Bring to a boil and boil until sugar is dissolved to make a simple syrup.
Combine orange juice, raspberries, pineapple juice, grapefruit juice, and simple syrup.
Chill.
When ready to serve, add soda water and ginger ale.

name: Jamaican Rum Punch
directions: Mix everything together, taste and adjust.
Garnish with pieces of pineapple and slices of lime.
Serve over ice.
You can keep Rum Punch forever in your refrigerator and in fact it gets better with age.

name: Sunshine Punch
directions: Prepare drink mix and orange juice concentrate according to package directions.
Combine in a large punch bowl.
Add in pineapple juice and stir; chill.
Before ready to serve, add in Sprite and mix.
Garnish each serving with skewered fruit.

name: Sangria De Los Angeles
directions: Strain juice from lemons and 1 orange.
Add sugar and mix well.
Place in large pitcher.
Cut peel from remaining orange in one continuous motion, leaving end attached to the fruit.
Drop into pitcher.
Add ice and wine and stir to blend.
Serve in goblets half-filled with crushed ice.
Garnish with lime slices or other fruit.

name: Red Cream Soda Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl or several pitchers, combine the water, concentrates and sugar; stir until sugar is dissolved. Refrigerate for 2 hours or until chilled. Just before serving, stir in the cream soda.

name: Fruit Punch
directions: Mix and serve chilled. Garnish with orange slices floated on top.

name: Sparkling Tropical Punch
directions: Combine pineapple, orange strawberries and mint in a 6 cup mold. Add enough water to fill. Freeze for 4 hours or overnight.
Combine pineapple juice and apple juice in a punch bowl. Unmold ice mold by wrapping the bottom of the mold with a hot, damp dishcloth. Place in punch bowl. Serve!

name: Red Holiday Punch
directions: Mix concentrate  and water. Chill.
Before serving, very slowly add carbonated beverage to concentrate and water mixture.
Add maraschino cherries as a garnish.

NOTE: Carbonated beverages: Use ginger ale or lemon-lime soda to add sourness to punch or use club soda for a sweeter punch. If you prefer a more carbonated punch, substitute half the water with carbonated soda.

name: Summertime Strawberry Punch
directions: In a food processor or blender, combine lemonade concentrate, strawberries and sugar. Cover and process until smooth. Transfer to a large pitcher or punch bowl; stir in tea. Add the ginger ale and ice cubes. Serve immediately.

name: Colada Cooler Punch
directions: Mix pina colada and juice concentrate in large container.  Stir in water.
Just before serving, pour into punch bowl.  Add soda and lemon and lime slices.  Pour over ice in glasses.

name: Cherry Orange Punch
directions: In a gallon container, combine water, orange juice concentrate, cherry juice and sugar; mix well.
Chill.  Just before serving, stir in ginger ale.

name: Lethal Sangria
directions: dice all fruit into small pieces.
place fruit, brandy and sugar in punch bowl and frigerate for one hour.
add wine and frigerate for another hour.
Add soda water before serving with ice cubes.
enjoy.

name: Guava Punch
directions: Bring sugar and water to a simmer for 10 minutes and chill until cold.  Stir in the juices.
Before serving, stir in the ginger ale and serve over cracked ice.

name: Rainbow Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, combine the pineapple juice and orange juice. Just before serving, add scoops of orange, lime and raspberry sherbets. Carefully pour ginger ale over sherbet; mix gently.

name: Hot Spiced Cheer
directions: Place cloves, cinnamon, and crystallized ginger on a double layer of cheesecloth.  Gather edges and tie together to make a pouch.

Combine cheescloth pouch, cider, pineapple juice, orange juice, lemon juice, sugar and salt in large stockpot and bring to a boil.  Reduce heat and simmer 20 minutes.  Discard cheesecloth pouch.  Serve with rum, if desired.

name: Orange Sherbet Party Punch
directions: Heat 2 cups water to boiling; add gelatin and sugar, stirring until dissolved.
Add 2 cups cold water and fruit juices.
Chill until ready to serve.
Just before serving, spoon in sherbet and pour in ginger ale.

name: Our Best Lemonade
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Taste and adjust.
Enjoy.

name: Tropical Punch
directions: Combine red tropical fruit punch, lemonade, orange and grape juice concentrates and water. Pour over an ice ring in a large punch bowl.
Just before serving, carefully pour in ginger ale and gently combine with other liquids.

name: Ginger Lemonade
directions: Mix sugar water and gingerroot in an 8 quart heavy pan.
Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.  Remove from heat and cool 15 minutes.  Remove gingerroot.
Pour sugar mixture into a pitcher or large glass or plastic container.
Stir in lemon juice and refrigerate at least on hour until chilled.
Serve over ice garnished with lemon slices.
I'm not sure of the number of servings.  I've halved this and served it at tea attended by 9 and had plenty.
Cooking time is chilling time.

name: Punch, Sangria (Yummy, Not Healthy)
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Chill.
Serve.

name: Punch, Cranberry (Yummy, Not Healthy)
directions: Chill cranberry juice and ginger ale.
Mix all ingredients.
Serve.

name: Lemon Float Punch
directions: Combine lemon juice and sugar; stir to dissolve sugar. Add water; chill.
To serve, in large punch bowl, combine lemon mixture and ginger ale. Add small scoops of sherbert, lemon slices and mint.

name: Strawberry Splash Punch
directions: In blender container, combine 1 1/2 cups strawberries and lemon juice; cover and blend until smooth.
Add sweetened condensed milk; cover and blend. Pour into large pitcher. Gradually stir in carbonated beverage. Add ice. Garnish each serving with whole strawberry (optional).

name: Birthday Party Punch
directions: Empty Kool-Aid powder into a 1 gallon pitcher or container.
Pour in Sunny Delight and Sprite.  DO NOT add sugar.
Stir until completely mixed.
Chill.

name: Wonderful Fruit Punch
directions: combine all juices and water.
Add ginger ale and ice when ready to serve.

name: Pineapple Ginger Punch With Citrus Ice Cubes
directions: CITRUS ICE CUBES: Fill each compartment of an ice cube tray with 1 piece of cut up fruit. Fill with water and freeze until solid.
PUNCH: In a large pitcher combine the punch ingredients except for the ginger ale and sliced oranges. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours but up to 24 hours.
Strain and discard ginger and the pulp.
Slowly stir in the ginger ale. Serve the punch over citrus ice cubes in chilled glasses.
Garnish with scewered orange slices.
Each serving approximately 3/4 cup.

name: Party Punch
directions: In a blender or food processor, blend the water, sugar and bananas until smooth. Pour into a large container. Add pineapple juice, orange juice and lemon juice; mix well. Freeze, stirring occasionally, until slushy. Add ginger ale when ready to serve.

name: Pretty Party Punch
directions: In a small bowl, stir the sugar, soft drink mix and hot water until sugar is dissolved. Cool to room temperature. Just before serving, combine the soft drink mixture, lemon-lime soda and ginger ale in a large punch bowl.

name: New Year's Eve Red Sangria
directions: Slice the orange and lemon.
Put the fruit in a 3 quart pitcher and cover with the rum.
Cover pitcher with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.  (Overnight is best.).
Add the Gran Marnier, Rioja, Orange Juice, Pomegranate Juice, Lemon Juice, and sugar to the pitcher.
Add soda up to 2 inches from the top of the pitcher.
Stir well, pressing the fruit as you stir.
Serve over ice (with extra soda, if you want).
Fruit can be used for additional batches, simply cover with rum and continue with step 4.

name: Banana Party Punch
directions: In a blender or food processor, blend the water, sugar and bananas until smooth. Pour into a large container. Add pineapple juice, orange juice, and lemon juice; mix well.
Freeze, stirring occasionally, until slushy. Add ginger ale when ready to serve.

name: Summer Spanish Sangria..get the Party Started!
directions: Have the fruit, rum, wine, and orange juice well chilled.
Slice the lemon, lime and orange into thin rounds and place in a large glass pitcher. Pour in the rum and sugar. Chill in refrigerator for 2 hours to develop the flavors.
When ready to serve, crush the fruit lightly with a wooden spoon and stir in the wine and orange juice. Adjust sweetness to taste.

name: Imagination Punch
directions: Place plastic cups in muffin pans. From each cherry, cut out a mouth shape; pat dry. Place one cherry mouth and two blueberries for eyes in the bottom of each cup. Pour 1 t. distilled water into each cup. Freeze for 30 minutes or until solid.

Pour 1 T. distilled water into each cup. Return to freezer; freeze for 3 hours or until solid. For punch, in a large bowl, dissolve gelatin in boiling water. Stir in cold water, pineapple juice and lemonade concentrate. Refrigerate for 1 1/2 hours or until chilled.
Just before serving, transfer to a 5 quart punch bowl. Stir in ginger ale. Remove ice cubes from cups; okace face side up in punch bowl.

name: Fruit Spritzer Punch
directions: Combine ingredients in a punch bowl.
Makes 27 (4 oz.) servings.

name: Strawberry Blush Punch
directions: Dissolve 1 1/2 cups sugar in 1 cup boiling water.
Mix all other ingredients into sugar/water mixture.
Freeze.
To serve, scoop slush into glasses to about 2/3rds full.
Top off with 7-up and serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri Slush
directions: Mix jello and Kool-aid with the hot water to dissolve.
Add to all the other ingredients and mix well.
Freeze 1 hour.
Stir well.
Return to freezer and leave for 4-6 hours before serving, stirring every hour or so to slush it up.
Serve cold in tall glasses.

name: Sherbet Punch
directions: Just before serving, place sherbert in punch bowl.
Add ginger ale and soda.
Stir until sherbert is almost dissolved.

name: Refreshing White Wine Citrus Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the wine, brandy, and orange liqueur.
Pour in the sugar, stir thoroughly to mix. Add all citrus slices to punchbowl.
Pour wine/liqueur mixture over the citrus slices.
Allow sangria to sit for 1 hour before serving to allow the citrus flavor to come through.

name: Raspberry Punch
directions: In 4-quart Dutch oven, cook raspberries over medium heat 10 minutes, stirring frequently; cool slightly.
Push through strainer with large spoon to remove seeds.
Refrigerate raspberry juice at least 2 hours.
In punch bowl or large pitcher, mix raspberry juice and lemonade concentrate.
Stir in ginger ale.
Serve immediately over ice.

name: White Wine Sangria With Raspberries
directions: cut lemon and lime into rounds.
mix all ingredients except for club soda.
chill for at least one hour, preferably two.
add club soda.
serve.

name: Holiday Cranberry Punch
directions: Soften 1 pint sherbet.
In a punch bowl, combine softened sherbet, lemon juice, orange juice and sugar.
Stir to dissolve sugar.
Add cranberry juice.
Add champagne.
Drop scoops of remaining sherbet on top of punch before serving.

name: Brunch Punch
directions: Stir together first 5 ingredients and chill 2 hours. Stir before serving.
Garnish, if desired.

name: Pineapple Punch
directions: Pour one can of juice plus 1 bottle of ginger ale into punch bowl.  Add ice and serve cold.

name: Cranberry Sangria
directions: Chill all ingredients.
Pour juices and wine into punch bowl.
Float orange slices on top.
Variations: You may adjust the proportions of juice to wine, depending on the strength and flavor profile of your particular wine.
This is also good with limes and lemons.
Ice cubes made of frozen juice are a nice addition, or you can freeze the citrus slices and use them to keep sangria cold.
This can be halved, doubled, tripled, etc. easily for any size group.

name: Fizzy Cranberry-Lemonade Punch
directions: In large pitcher, stir together cranberry-juice cocktail and undiluted lemonade concentrate until blended.
Then, stir in seltzer, and ice cubes if you like.
Garnish with orange pieces.
Serve immediately.
OR.
You can blend this ahead and keep it chilled, but don't add the cold seltzer and ice cubes until just before serving.

name: A Bunch of Punch
directions: Combine citric acid and boiling water in a ceramic heatproof container; stir until citric acid dissolves. Let stand 24 hours.
Combine sugar and 5 quarts cold water; stir until sugar dissolves.
Add citric acid mixture, chilled pineapple juice, and orange juice concentrate; stir mixture well.
Serve over ice.

name: Pink Champagne Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine the cranberry juice concentrate, lemonade concentrate, burgundy wine, club soda and champagne.
Add ice cubes.
Serve immediately.

name: Sweetheart Punch
directions: Mix juices together, refergerate 2 hrs add cold ginger ale. at serving time fill glasses 3/4 full yhen add a scoop of sherbert!

name: Sangria
directions: Combine everything except club soda and refrigerate overnight.
Mix with club soda just before serving.

name: Sparkling Punch
directions: Chill juices and mineral water before starting.
In a large pitcher, combine the fruit juices and sparkling water.
Pour over ice.

name: Apricot Nectar Punch
directions: Combine the apricot nectar, thawed orange juice, water and lemon juice in a large bowl.
Stir until well blended.
Add the pureed apricots and blend well.
Immediately before serving, slowly stir in the ginger ale.

name: Hot Winter Punch
directions: In a large bowl, mix lemonade and orange juice concentrates with 5 12-ounce cans of water and set aside.
In a large pot, mix sugar and 2 cups water; bring to a boil and let cook until it becomes syrupy.
Turn down heat and mix in the orange, lemonade mixture, cranberry juice, cider, and juice from the jar of cherries.
Heat well.
Place cherries in bottom of cups before adding the punch and serve hot.

name: Old Fashion Wedding Punch
directions: Heat sugar and water until syrup.
In a large bowl, mix mix frozen concentrates and hot syrup so as to melt the concentrates.
Add ginger ale and ice cubes to cool down punch, then drop in sherbert by the spoonfuls.
Serve cold.

name: Grape-Cranberry Holiday Punch
directions: Combine grape juice concentrate, cranberry juice concentrate and orange juice in large punch bowl.  Just before serving, add 2 quarts chilled lemon-lime soda.  Use the other 2 quarts and make ice molds.  Orange and lime slices can be frozen in the molds for decoration. A pint of Orange sherbet is a nice addition and some people have even added vodka.

name: Mauby Punch
directions: cook mauby in water, strain.
Mix the mauby liquid with remaining ingredients.
Serve over the ice.

name: Orange Potion Punch
directions: In large bowl, just before serving, combine orange soda and seltzer.
In another bowl, lightly blend vanilla ice cream and orange sherbet.
Top it all on the orange soda mix.
Bon appétit!

name: Super Easy Fruity Punch
directions: Blend the lemon juice concentrate and fruit until well mixed.
Pour into punch bowl.
Add Ginger Ale slowly and stir gently.

name: December Cider
directions: In a 4-qt dutch oven, combine apple juice concentrate, cranberry-apple concentrate, and 9 cups of water.
Stir in lemonade concentrate, the 5 sticks of cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
Bring to boiling.  Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Removed cloves and cinnamon before serving. Stir in rum or schnapps, if using.  Serve warm with a cinnamon stick in each mug.

name: Mulled Cranberry Wine
directions: Combine all ingredients except vodka, sweetened dried cranberries and almonds in a large saucepan.
Heat to boiling, reduce heat and simmer 15 minutes.
Strain punch to remove spices.
Stir in vodka, if desired.
Place 1 tablespoon sweetened dried cranberries and 1 1/2 teaspoons almonds in bottom of each punch glass or mug.
Pour mulled wine over mixture.

similar.name: Hot Cranberry Tea / Spiced Cranberry Punch

name: Apple Orchard Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine apple juice, cranberry juice concentrate and orange juice. Stir until mixed.
Slowly pour the ginger ale down the sides of the bowl.
Thinly slice the apple vertically, forming whole apple slices. Float apple slices on the top of the punch.
You can also try floating dried apple rings or orange slices. You can also make a frozen juice ring. I think this might be good with a spiced cinnamon syrup.

name: Raspberry Champagne Punch
directions: Combine all in large punch bowl (except sherbet) til well combined and sugar is dissolved.
Add scoops of sherbet just before serving.
This serves 15-20 guests using small, 4-6 oz. punch cups.

name: Grannys Holiday Punch
directions: Bring 1 qt of cold water to full roling boil.
remove from heat.
Add tea all at once.
Brew 4 minutes.
Remove bags, and put brewed tea in punch bowl.
Add sugar and stir until disolved.
cool to room temperature.
Add juices and water.
Refrigerate.
when ready to serve, add ginger ale and block of ice.
Garnish with lemon, and orange slices. Add cherries.
Makes 50 servings.

name: Pretty Berry Cherry Punch
directions: Peel the skin from a lemon with a vegetable peeler, avoiding the bitter white pith. Cut into long thin strips.
Drain can of cherries and place in large clear glass pitcher.
Add strawberries, assorted berries, lemonade, ginger ale, cold black tea, mint leaves and lemon rind.
Cover and chill for at least 3 hours.
Add ice cubes when serving.
Can be garnished with berries on a toothpick.

name: Sparkling Punch
directions: Pour juices into a large glass pitcher or bowl and stir.
Add passionfruit flesh or juice and stir.
Ice can be added to pitcher or individual glasses.
Garnish with halved orange and lemon slices.

name: Banana Crush Punch
directions: Combine the sugar and water in a large pot and bring to a boil.  Cool.
Add the fruit juices and bananas and mix well.  Place in a container and freeze.
When ready to serve, plae the fruit mixture in a punch bowl.  Allow to soften slightly.  Break into slush.
Add the soda, raspberries if using, and tint with food coloring if desired.

name: Citrus Champagne Punch
directions: In a punch bowl combine orange juice and lemonade concentrates.
Add wine and water; stir to combine.
Add champagne, but do not stir.
If desired, float ice ring and fruit slices on top.
Serve immediately. Makes 10 (6-ounce) servings.
To Make Ahead: Chill the wine and champagne up to 24 hours ahead.
If desired, prepare the ice ring up to 3 days ahead.

name: Raspberry Mint Cooler
directions: In a large saucepan, bring water, mint and sugar to a boil.
Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Remove from the heat; let stand for 5 minutes.
Add the raspberries and the lemonade concentrate; gently mash raspberries.
Line a strainer with four layers of cheesecloth; place over a 1-gal. container.
Slowly pour raspberry mixture into strainer' and discard pulp and mint.
Add cold water to the raspberry juice; stir well.
Serve over ice.

name: Six Things Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine fruit punch, lemonade concentrate, orange juice concentrate and grape juice concentrate.
Stir in the water, then the ginger ale.
Float orange slices on top.

name: Orange Sherbet Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients except sherbet and 7-Up.
Add 7-Up and sherbet just before serving.
Drop sherbet in balls with an ice cream scoop.

name: White Christmas Punch
directions: Combine sugar and water, stir constantly and cook over medium heat until sugar dissolves.
Remove from heat and add evaporated milk, and almond extract.  Let cool.
Chill until ready to serve.
Combine milk mixture and remaining ingredients to punch bowl just before serving.
Stir to break up ice cream into small pieces.

name: Christmas Wassail
directions: Stud the oranges with the whole cloves and bake in a 300 degree oven for 30 minutes.
On top of the stove, heat the cider and cinnamon sticks until almost boiling.
Pour the hot cider into a large punch bowl.  Add the studded oranges.  Add the brandy to taste -- the more the merrier!
To replenish wassail, just add more heated cider and more brandy.  The longer the oranges sit in the punch, the more orange flavor there is to it.

name: Pali Punch
directions: Combine all ingreditns and stir until sugar is dissolved.
Chill two or more hours.
Serve over ice. Garnish with fresh fruit sticks or mint.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Combine lemonade, orange juice and strawberries with 3 cups water.
Mix in a punch bowl.
Add the chilled ginger ale.

name: Pineapple-Orange Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, combine the ice cream, sherbet, pineapple juice and ginger ale.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)
directions: Stir the concentrates together in a large glass punch bowl.
Add in all remaining ingredients, stirring to combine.
Add in ice and serve immediately.

name: Cranberry Wassail
directions: In a paper coffee filter place the nutmeg, cinnamon and allspice.  Tie top together with string from teabag.
Steep teabag(s) and spices in 2 1/2 cups water in a sauce pan for about five minutes.
In a large bowl combine cranberry sauce, 1 1/2 cups boiling water and 3/4 cup sugar.  You can do it by hand but an electric mixer saves time and energy.  Mix until there are no lumps.
Add orange juice, realemon juice and another 1 1/2 cups boiling water.
Remove teabag and spices from sauce pan.  Add the tea and cranberry mixtures together.  You can use a Dutch oven or a crock pot.
You can add more water to dilute the mixture to taste.  It will keep for about 10 days, though its never lasted that long.

similar.name: Hot Cranberry Tea / Spiced Cranberry Punch

name: Tropical Punch
directions: Stand watermelon on end; cut thin slice off bottom to make it level.
Cut top third off melon.
Using cup as a guide, trace scallops around top outside edge of melon.
Carve scalloped edge following pattern.
Scoop out fruit; serve later.
Chill melon shell.
Combine fruit punch, concentrates, and water.
Pour over ice in melon bowl.
Carefully pour ginger ale down side of melon, mix with up and down motion.
Float orange and lime slices.

name: Lemon Punch
directions: Combine sugar and 2 cups of water; heat stirring constantly till sugar dissolves, cool.
Add 2 cups water, lemon peel and juice, chill.
Pour in chilled punch bowl, add scoops of sherbert stirring till partially melted.
Add ginger ale stirring in an up and down motion.

name: Lime Sherbet Punch
directions: Let the sherbet and ice cream defrost slightly in fridge.
Mix everything except ginger ale in large punch bowl.
Add ginger ale at the last minute.

similar.name: Awesome Sherbet Punch - Great for Baby or Wedding Showers

name: Vineyard Punch
directions: Combine 1st 3 ingredients w/sugar & lime slices in large saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat & simmer 5-10 minutes.
Remove from heat & cool. Strain into large bowl, cover & chill for at least 1 hour.
Pour over ice mold in punch bowl, add sparkling wine + bitters & serve immediately in wine glasses.
NOTE: Yield was based on 2 5-oz servings per person.

SERVING IDEA: I hate waste & think it would be a good idea to reserve the strawberry solids strained from the simmered wine, puree them w/an immersion blender or food processor & freeze the puree in an ice cube tray to use in place of the suggested ice mold. :-).

name: Raspberry Lemonade Cooler
directions: Mash berries in large bowl.
Add vodka; cover and chill overnight.
Strain, pressing on solids to release liquid (there should be about 3 cups raspberry vodka).
Place lemon pieces, sugar, and ginger, if desired, in large pitcher.
Mash lemons with large wooden spoon to release juices.
Add lemonade and raspberry vodka; stir to blend.
This can be made 8 hours ahead.
Cover and chill.
Add ice cubes to pitcher and stir well.
Divide lemonade, mashed lemons, and ice among 8 glasses.
Garnish with mint sprigs and serve.

name: Mom's Party Punch
directions: Let the sherbet thaw slightly enough to easily come out of the container.
Place slightly thawed sherbet in punch bowl.
Pour juicy juice and sprite over sherbet.
Mix the juice and sprite and serve.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: In two large pitchers or a large punch bowl, combine the first six ingredients.
Gently stir in soda.
Serve immediately.

name: Sparkling Pink Lemonade
directions: Mix sugar, juice and coloring.
Chill.
Just before serving add club soda.
Garnish.

name: Cranberry Splash Punch
directions: Mix all juices and puréed berries and chill thoroughly.
To serve:.
Put the Splash into a handsome container, add ice and fruit. Slowly stir in orange soda.

name: Citrus Fruit Punch
directions: Combine all the concentrates with the water, then stir in the syrup, before chilling.
Pour into a large punch bowl & add ice, before SLOWLY pouring in the carbonated beverage, [& the curacao, if desired].
Garnish with the sliced oranges, if desired.

name: Fluffy Orange, Banana, and Strawberry Punch
directions: Place 2 extra-ripe bananas in blender or food processor container.
Cover; blend until smooth.
Add to punch bowl.
Stir in sherbet, juice, and soda.
Add banana slices and strawberries.

name: Cranberry Sparkle
directions: Beat the cranberry sauce until smooth, then stir in the orange & lemon juices.
Pour this mixture over ice cupes in a 2-quart pitcher or punch bowl.
CAREFULLY pour in the ginger ale, mixing carefully before serving.

name: Cranberry-Cherry Punch
directions: Dissolve gelatin in boiling water, then stir in the lemonade concentrate.
Add the cold water & cranberry juice cocktail.
Place 8-10 cups of ice cubes OR a molded ice ring in a large punch bowl, & pour the punch over the ice.
SLOWLY pour the ginger ale down the inside of the punch bowl, & mix carefully by pushing the ice cubes/ring up & down several times.
If desired, add scoops of fruit-flavored sherbet.

name: Cider Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pan with the exception of the sugar and ginger ale.
Sweetn to taste and then chill.
When ready to use add ginger ale and serve.
Serve very cold.

name: Cranberry Orange Fizz
directions: Combine all liquids into a pitcher.
Fill four glasses with ice and pour mixture over top.

name: Tropical Fruit Punch
directions: Peel and pit the mango and chop the flesh.
Place in food processor or blender with the lime juice, ginger and sugar and process until smooth.
Add the orange and pineapple juices then add the rum and process again until blended.
Divide the crushed ice between glasses and pour the punch over the ice.
Add the lime and orange slices and arrange the pineapple slices on the rim of each glass.

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: Dissolve gelatin and sugar in hot water; cool.
Add remaining ingredients.
Pour over ice in a punch bowl.
Garnish with fresh strawberries and mint.

name: Yummy Sangria
directions: Mix the 2 c of orange juice and 1/4 c grenadine together and pour into a mould such as a bundt pan and freeze it.
Combine all the rest of the ingredients except the pop and put in a large pitcher in the fridge for the day or even overnight is just fine.

Put the frozen orange/grenadine mould in the punch bowl.  Pour in the contents of the pitcher.  Through in a handful of frozen or fresh strawberries if you are so inclined.  Gently pour in the pop.  I find that 50/50 pop to Sangria mixture is good, but use less if you like a stronger punch.
Ladle it out and enjoy!

name: Mock Champagne Punch
directions: Heat the sugar and the water slowly until all the sugar is melted, stirring occasionally. Let this mixture cool.
Add the lemon juice, almond extract, and vanilla extract.
For every cup of this mixture, put 2 quarts of ginger ale in the punch bowl and add crushed ice.

similar.name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)

name: Luscious Mock Champagne Punch
directions: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan:bring to a boil.
Remove from heat, and cool.
Stir in lemonade concentrate: chill.
Combine chilled mixture, catawba and ginger ale in a punch bowl just before serving.

name: Temperance Punch
directions: Mix together; float orange slices on top.
Chill in the fridge. Has a gorgeous color & great taste.

name: Apple,  Mango  Punch
directions: Chill six glasses in freezer, until ready to use. When ready, place two or three ice cubes in each glass.
In a large pitcher mix mango rum, spiced apple cider, key lime juice, and ginger ale together.
Pour punch into prepared glasses and garnish with a plastic spear holding lime wedge, mango chunk and piece of candied ginger.

name: Tko Sangria Punch (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Empty drink mix into large pitcher.
Add cranberry juice cocktail, orange juice  and lime juice; stir until drink mix is completely dissolved.
Stir in club soda and fruit.
Serve over ice cubes in tall glasses.

name: Hot Cranberry Tea / Spiced Cranberry Punch
directions: In a saucepan, combine cranberry juice, orange juice, cinnamon, cloves, and allspice; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to medium, and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove cinnamon and cloves, and discard.
Add hot tea to cranberry juice mixture; mix.
Serve hot or cold, garnished with lemon (store any leftovers in refrigerator).

name: Fruity Cider Punch
directions: Chill a large glass pitcher (at least 64oz) in the freezer for about 45 minutes (or until frosted).
Add the two bottles of WoodChuck Amber Cidar, cranberry/raspberry juice, soda water, and 7up.
Mix ingredients with a long cocktail spoon.
Add the raspberries, the ice and top with lemon slices.
Serve in little 8oz punch cups.
They are great for showers and get togethers.

name: Kool-Aid Punch
directions: Place drink mix in glass pitcher. Add water; stir until drink mix is dissolved.
Stir in ice, juice and nectar.
Pour into punch bowl or serve from pitcher.

name: Pali Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients, stirring until sugar is dissolved.
Garnish with fruit sticks.

name: Raspberry Sparkle Punch
directions: Process raspberries in a blender; strain and discard seeds.
Combine raspberry pulp, lemonade concentrate, and water; chill.
Combine raspberry mixture and Sprite; stir well; serve in tall glasses over ice.
Garnish with mint sprigs.

name: Azalea Punch
directions: In large jar, blend cranberry and pineapple juices with extract and sugar.
Chill thoroughly.
Just before serving, add chilled ginger ale.

name: Church Slush Punch
directions: Dissolve jello and sugar in boinling water, then add all other ingredients. Mix well. Pour into 1 qt plastic containers and freeze.
To serve, remove frozen punch concentrate 2 hours before serving.
Add 2 qts gingerale to 1 qt concentrante.
Stir to create slushy punch.

name: Cranberry Burst
directions: Pour all ingredients, except garnish, into a glass with ice. Garnish with orange slice.

name: G's Christmas Punch
directions: Mix everything.
Drink it.

name: Rosey Punch
directions: Combine frozen orange juice and lemonade with water in a large punch bowl.
Cill; Add thawed frozen strawberries and ginger ale when ready to serve.
Garnish with whole berries and orange slices.

name: Party Punch
directions: Simmer all ingredients together for ten minutes.
Strain and serve hot.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Punch
directions: Empty can of jellied cranberry sauce into a 2-qt saucepan. Over med-heat setting, add water & beat w/an immersion blender or hand-held mixer till sauce is melted.
Add sugar & cont cooking till sugar is dissolved, stirring as needed. Add dried cranberries & set mixture aside to cool. Then refrigerate till well-chilled.
When chilled, add lemon juice, extract & 1 cup of ginger ale.
Just before serving, add remaining 1/2 cup ginger ale & serve in frosted glasses. Garnish w/mint &/or clove-studded lemon slices as desired.

name: Peach Sangria
directions: Combine lemonade concentrate and water in a 3 Quart container, stirring well; add peaches, strawberries, orange, and lime. Freeze.
Remove fruit mixture from freezer 2 hours before serving.
To serve, place fruit mixture in a punch bowl; add wine and club soda, stirring gently to mix. Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Sweetheart Punch
directions: Arrange 1 cup of fresh strawberries in 4 1/2 cup ring mold; add 2 cups water slowly, so the don't float.  Freeze until solid.  Top with remaining fresh strawberries.  Slowly pour 1 cup water into mold to almost cover berries. Freeze until solid.
In a punch bowl, combine the lemonade concentrate, thawed strawberries,orange juice concentrate and remaining water.  Refrigerate until chilled.
Just before serving, stir in lemon-lime soda. Unmold the ice ring by wrapping the bottom of the mold in a damp hot dishtowel; invert onto a baking sheet. Place fruit side up in punch bowl.

name: Sangria Barcelona
directions: Make simple syrup by combining water and sugar in saucepan.  Stir over low heat until sugar is dissolved.  Cover pan and simmer 2 minutes.  Remove from heat.
In large pitcher, mix together wine, club soda, juices, cognac, fruit slices and cinnamon sticks.
Stir in simple syrup.
Mix all together and chill.
Stir again, then serve in a clear glass pitcher over ice cubes.
Enjoy!

name: Sangria
directions: Add all ingredients to a large serving pitcher or punchbowl.
Stir to combine.
Let stand 45 minutes, refridgerated.
Serve over ice if desired.

name: Sangria
directions: Mix together the rum and sugar in a large glass pitcher until the sugar dissolved. Add the thinly sliced fruit. Let sit for at least 2 hours and up to 6 hours in the refrigerator. Right before serving, add the red wine and orange juice. Stir well and serve chilled.

name: Sangria
directions: Place the orange and lemon in a bowl. Pour over the Grand Marnier and chill thoroughly.
Mix together the Grand Marnier mixture, red wine, coca-cola and lemonade in a large bowl with ice. Serve at once.

similar.name: Summer Spanish Sangria..get the Party Started!

name: Cranberry Lemonade Ginger Ale
directions: Mix all ingredients together and enjoy! Also can be done with limeade instead of lemonade, but limeade comes off very strong. Makes one very large drink, or two small ones. Also can add vodka for a great grown up drink! Also can be done as a punch bowl drink!

name: Pineapple Punch
directions: Stir up, and serve in a punch bowl!

name: Cranberry-Ginger Fizzes
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the ginger ale and cranberry juice cocktail, both chilled.
Pour into flutes.

name: Jiffy Punch
directions: In punch bowl combine orange juice and water; mix well.
Add ice cubes, then 7-up.
Puree strawberries and add, stirring to mix. Add mint and/or lime slices as garnish. Enjoy!

name: Party Punch
directions: Add equal parts of all chilled ingredients and top with frozen fruits.
Serve in a huge punch bowl.

name: Totally Tropical Genuine Rum Punch
directions: In a large bowl, combine rum, pineapple juice, juice of oranges, juice of limes and sugar.
Add ginger ale just before serving.
Chill, serve over ice in glass, garnish.
(For a special flavour -- top each serving of  punch with 1 oz of Malibu Coconut Rum).

name: Honey Banana Punch
directions: In a blender, add bananas and orange juice concentrate. Put a cover on the blender and process until smooth.
Into a large bowl pour the mixture and add pineapple juice, water, honey, sugar, and the soft drink mix. Stir well until sugar is dissolved.
Pour this into two 2 quart freezer containers and cover. Freeze until a slushy texture is obtained.
To serve: Using 2 large pitchers transfer each container of fruit slush to pitchers. Slowly add 2 liters of soda to each pitcher and stir to blend.

name: Ginger Pineapple and Orange Punch
directions: Combine juices, water and sugar in a pan. Stir over a low heat till sugar dissolves. Cool and chill.
Add chilled ginger ale and orange segments just before serving.

name: Totally Orange Punch
directions: Chill all ingredients well before mixing.
Scoop sherbet into a large punch bowl.
Stir to soften.
Slowly add the sukist.

name: Cool Pink Punch
directions: A day or so before the occasion: Dissolve jello in 2 cups hot water. Stir in 1 ½ cup sugar. Stir in lemonade, pineapple juice, 2 cups cold water & mix. Pour into small-medium size Tupperware containers and freeze.

The day of serving: Take out of freezer and let defrost some. (maybe 30 minutes to 1 hour prefer guests arrive). Scoop out of bowl from freezer and put in serving container. Pour 1/4 to 1/2 container of ginger ale over frozen mixture. Let sit before serving. **Try to put 1/2 and 1/2 ratio of punch and ginger ale in serving bowl.
Continue to replenish with frozen mixture and ginger ale as needed. ENJOY and let me know what you think!

name: Tropical Punch
directions: In a large jug, mix together the Malibu, Midori, banana liqueur and pineapple juice with ice.
Thread alternate pieces of pineapple and banana onto skewers.
Serve the punch in highball glasses, garnished with a fruit skewer.

name: Simple Citrus Punch
directions: Chill all ingredients.
Mix gently in a pitcher or punch bowl.

name: Fruit Punch
directions: Mix everything together, except for fruit, in an attractive punch bowl.
Add fruit. Serve in punch cups.

name: Jamaican Pineapple Punch
directions: Wash the peel of the pineapple & orange & place in a large bowl with spices & sugar.
Add boiling water, stir, cover & leave overnight.
Add juices & serve either hot or cold.

name: Golden Wedding Punch
directions: Dilute frozen juices according to directions on cans.
Add 1 cup of sugar, stir well to dissolve.
Refrigerate at least 2 hours.
Pour into punch bowl, add ginger ale and fruit slices just before serving.

name: Red Wine Sangria
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher.
Refrigerate at least 24 hours before serving.  Serve very cold.

name: Fruited Tea Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, bring water to a boil.
Remove form heat and add tea bags.
Let steep 10 minutes; remove tea bags.
Stir in sugar until dissolved.
Refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour.
To serve, pour tea into a large sun tea jar or punch bowl.  Add ice cubes and fruit slices and serve immediately.
Note: For spiked punch, add 2 cups bourbon just before serving.

name: Freshly Squeezed Real Lemonade
directions: Start by making your simple syrup.  This will be used to sweeten your lemonade (instead of plain granulated sugar) If you like a sweeter lemonade you may want to make more syrup & add it to your taste.  Just stick with the 1 part sugar to 1 part water ratio.
Combine the 1 1/3 cups water with the 1 1/3 cups sugar in a medium sauce pan.
While stirring, bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
Allow the mixture to slowly boil for about 2 minutes, or until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Remove the simple syrup mixture from the heat and allow it to cool.
For the lemonade:.
Cut each lemon in half & use a juicer to get all the juice from each lemon.
Use a spoon to dig out the pulp from the lemon halves.
Put the lemon juice, pulp & rines into a serving container (plastic jug, dispenser etc).
Add the 2 quarts of cold water & the 2 2/3 cups simple syrup.
Allow the mixture to chill in the fridge until you are going to use.
To Serve:.
Fill a glass 3/4 full with ice.
Pour the chilled lemonade mixture over the ice & enjoy.

name: Lavender Mint Tea Punch
directions: Brew the mint in the water in a large pot for roughly ten minutes.
Add the lavender blossoms.
Allow tea to cool, then strain.
Pour tea into a large punch bowl.
Add the ginger ale, grape juice and ice cubes.
To garnish,  float lavender buds and mint sprigs on top.

name: Berry Rum Punch
directions: Bring 2/3 cup water and sugar to boil in medium saucepan, stirring until sugar dissolves.  Remove from heat; cool syrup completely.  Puree 2 cups raspberries in processor.  Pour puree through a fine strainer set over saucepan with syrup.  Press on solids to extract as much liquid as possible; discard solids.
Mix orange juice, and next 6 ingredients, 1 cup berries and raspberry syrup in a glass bowl.  Cover; chill at least  hours and up to 1 day.  Strain into pitcher.  Serve punch over ice.

name: Orange Champagne Punch
directions: In a large mixing bowl, place the orange juice concentrage, the orange liqueur and 1 bottles of the ginger ale.  Stir well.
Place the ice ring in the punch bowl and slowly pour the liquid mixture.
Then, SLOWLY pour in the remaining ginger ale and champagne.
Stir slightly before serving.

similar.name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)

name: Christmas Punch
directions: Dissolve sugar and cherry Jello in boiling water. Stir well.
Add the juices and almond extract.
Add the cold water and stir well (you can use another 2 cups of water if you think the punch is too strong for your tastes).
Place this mixture in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours before serving.
Prior to serving, pour the refrigerated mixture into your punch bowl.
SLOWLY stir in the sherbet then the ginger ale.
Stir slightly to mix before serving.

name: Sunset Punch
directions: Combine first four ingredients in a large bowl; chill.  Stir in ginger ale; scoop sherbert (or sorbet) into punch.  Serve immediately.

name: Slushed Slushy Slush
directions: Bring water to a boil.
Remove from heat and add tea bags for 15 minutes.
Remove tea bags and add sugar, stir until dissolved.
Pour into the large container you will be freezing it in .
Add your cans of orange juice and lemonade, stir well.
Add vodka, stir well.
Freeze!  It takes about 24-36 hours to freeze properly.
Once frozen, scoop out into glasses (about 1/2 full) and add gingerale or 7-up.
Let the party begin!

name: Boomette's Sangria
directions: Mix all the ingredients in a pitcher except the carbonated water.
Put in the fridge for a few hours.
Serve in glasses with ice.  Top with carbonated water.  Garnish with a slice of orange or any other fruits.

name: Pink Delicious Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Stir well.

name: Slush Punch
directions: Mix jello and sugar with boiling water until dissolved completely.
Add lemonade and pineapple juice. Mix well.
Add tap water and mix well.
Pour mixture into freezer safe containers or gallon freezer bags. Place in freezer over night.
Take out to thaw 2 hours before serving.
If using containers, use butter knife to break up. If using baggies, squish bags to break up.
Place punch in punch bowl.
Pour ginger ale over top of punch, stirring to make mixture slushy.
Depending on how slushy you want your punch, will be the amount of gingerale or Sprite you add.

similar.name: Sweet and Tangy Lime Slush Punch

name: " White" Sangria
directions: Pour wine, vodka, schnapps and peach coulis in a pitcher with the slices of fruits 12 hours before serving the sangria.
Keep in the fridge.
Just before serving, add ice, fruit juices and complete with lemonade.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Punch
directions: In a large pitcher combine cranberry juice and lemonade.
Add tea and chill till serving time.
To serve add ice to glasses and fill halfway with juice mixture.
Top with soda water.

name: Rhubarb Slush Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, bring rhubarb and 4 cups of water to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 5-8 minutes or until the rhubarb is tender. Mash the rhubarb and strain. Reserve juice and discard pulp. Add sugar, concentrates and remaining water to juice. Transfer to a freezer container and freeze.
Remove from the freezer 30-45 minutes before serving, scraping the surface as it thaws. Place equal amounts of slush mixture and club soda in each serving glass. Stir together and serve immediately.

name: Green Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, dissove gelatin in 1 quart hot water. Allow to cool.
When gelatin is cool, pour into a large punch bowl.  Stir in pineapple juice, orange juice concentrate, sugar and cold water.  Pour in ginger ale just before serving.

name: Tropical Punch
directions: Combine ingredients.  Refrigerate before serving or serve over ice.

name: Sangria
directions: First prepare the fruit and sprinkle it with some orange juice and brandy.  Chill for 1/2 hour.

Divide the fruit between the two pitchers and pour in brandy to just cover the fruit, it also depends on the brandy you use, so be cautious with the amount at first you can always add more later if needed.
Pour half a bottle of wine into each pitcher, top up with 7up, add lemon juice and sugar to taste (this depends on the wine you use so the amount is up to you) stir to blend.

Finally, garnish with lemon slices and mint and cover the pitchers with saran wrap.  Chill for 4 hours before serving. It is really important to make it ahead of time.  The taste will change at first when you make it, it will taste quite strong,but after chilling for several hours it will mellow as the fruit will absorb some of the alcohol.

name: Berry Strawberry Punch
directions: Stir together all ingredients.
Cover and chill.
Serve over ice.

name: Champagne Punch
directions: Drip the angostura bitters onto the sugar cubes in a zipper bag.

At least 30 minutes before serving time, add the brandy to the sugar cubes and mash the bag until the sugar is dissolved. Store the bag in the refrigerator until serving time. This may be done much earlier, if desired.
At serving time, add Champagne, wine, and brandy mixture to a chilled, 2-quart pitcher. Garnish with orange slices.

name: Cranberry-Raspberry Sangria
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in a large pitcher, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Taste at this point and if you want it a little sweeter, add a little bit more sugar.
Add fruit slices and cranberries; cover and chill at least 8 hours.
Stir in club soda and ice cubes just before serving.

name: Sangria
directions: Mix wine, brandy and sugar in a large clear container until sugar dissolves. Add fruit in bite size pieces with slices of orange with peel to mix. Just before serving, add soda and serve over ice. Lovely for a hot afternoon!

name: Peach-Raspberry Sangria
directions: Cut vanilla bean lengthwise. Scrape out the black seeds and put at bottom of pitcher. Discard the pods.
Combine all the other ingredients. Be careful with the liquid because the fruit will cause it to overflow if the pitcher is too full!
Chill sangria overnight to get maximum flavor.
Just before serving, add ice cubes. Try using extra raspberries to make raspberry ice cubes for an extra pretty sangria! :) Enjoy!

name: Tropical Fruit Punch --- Alcoholic
directions: Combine juices in a pitcher. Stir in soda and rum. Serve over ice garnished with a pineapple wedge.

name: Black Punch
directions: Make Kool Aid according to instructions using the water, sugar and Kool Aid in a large punch bowl.
Mix in the Vodka.
When  ready to serve add the Ginger Ale.

name: Sherbet Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, dilute 2 cans of berry punch with 4 cans of water (about 4 cups). Mix.
Add sherbet to taste (usually about 2/3 of a container). Stir partially to dissolve.
Fill the punch bowl with 7-Up.
You can play around with this depending on the size of the group and cost.  You could use an extra can of juice with 2 cups/cans of water and less sherbet.
Enjoy!

name: Sangria by the Seaside
directions: In bowl, mix lime juice and sugar, making sure to dissolve the sugar. Add wine, oj, triple sec, and tequila.
Pour into pitcher and refrigerate several hours to chill.
Add fruit and serve 'on the rocks'.

name: The World's Best Sangria
directions: Mix wine, sugar and fruit in a glass bowl or pitcher.  Let sit in the fridge for 18-24 hours.  The mixture will have a somewhat syrupy consistency.
Before serving, stir in the brandy and cut the mixture with soda water until it has a thinner, more wine-like consistency.
Serve in wine glasses.
(You could use orange or lemon flavored soda instead of soda water.).

name: Red Velvet Punch
directions: Mix the first 4 ingredients in a large container.
Cover and chill for at least 8 hours.
Pour into a punch bowl and stir in the ginger ale.

name: Holiday Classic Wassail
directions: Place the cinnamon sticks, cloves, and allspice in the center of a large paper coffee filter.  Fold the ends over and roll up burrito-style.  Tie closed with dental floss or thread, leaving long ends.
Mix apple juice concentrate with water as directed on can (you should end up with 6 cups of juice).

In a saucepan combine apple juice, cranberry juice, sugar, and bitters.  Bring to a boil.  Tie the ends of the "spice bag" string to the middle of a wooden spoon and lay the spoon over the top of the pot so that the "spice bag" hangs in the juice without touching the bottom of the pot.  Reduce heat and simmer at least 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and add rum.
Once I've made the wassail and added the rum, I pour this into a crock pot on low temp so that the warm wassail can be served up throughout the evening!

name: Raspberry-Cranberry Champagne Punch
directions: When ready to serve, combine all ingredients in large punch bowl; stir gently to blend.
One serving=1/2 cup.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Mix the sugar into the cranberry juice until it dissolves.  Add the pineapple juice and gingerale.  Serve cold.

name: Cran-Orange Punch
directions: Combine the cranberry & orange juices, vodka and lime juice in a large punch bowl.  Slowly pour in the club soda and then add ice.
Serve immediately & enjoy!

name: Family Party Fruit Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Serve in a punch bowl with ice.

name: Fruit Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl or mixing bowl place the apple, orange and strawberries.
Pour over the apple juice and pineapple juice and then stir in the diet lemonade.
Stir to combine and serve.

similar.name: Fluffy Orange, Banana, and Strawberry Punch

name: Christmas Punch
directions: Add boiling water to jello and stir to completely dissolve.
Add cold water and sugar to the jello and mix well.
Add fruit juices one at a time,mixing well.
Pour into two 1 qt containers and freeze in freezer.
When ready  to serve,put the slightly thawed mixture into a large punchbowl and crush with a large fork.Pour  ginger ale over  mixtureand add a pint of freah  sliced strawberries.

name: Champagne Punch
directions: Stir together concentrates in punch bowl. Add remaining ingredients, stirring gently. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Easy Champagne Punch (Alcohol-Free or With Champagne)

name: Warm Christmas Punch
directions: In crockpot, combine juices, red-hots and cinnamon stick.
Cook on low for 2-5 hours.
Remove cinnamon stick before serving.
Use additional cinnamon sticks as stirrers if desired.

name: Fruit Punch Slush
directions: Day before:  Mix all ingredients together.
Pour into a clean container for freezing. Hint:  I use a clean 1/2 gallon cardboard milk carton.
Remove from freezer approximately an hour before serving.
Place in punch bowl.
Add 1 quart ginger ale.
Stir until slushy.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Boil water and sugar together.
Cool and mix in lemon juice, cranberry juice and orange juice.
Pour over ice in large punch bowl.
Pour in ginger ale.

name: Merry Berry Christmas Punch
directions: Pour boiling water into a heatproof jug.  Add teabags and stand for 5 minutes Drain and discard tea bags.
Place cooled tea, mint leaves, strawberries and mixed berries into a large punch bowl or 2 large jugs.  Add apple cider.  Slowly add sparking wine and serve.

name: Easy Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl combine the powdered drink mix with pineapple juice, sugar and water; stir until no sugar granules remain.
Stir in ginger ale.
Add in lots of ice.

name: Wedding Punch
directions: Boil water.
Mix cherry-flavored drink mix with sugar into boiling water.
Add frozen juices.
Stir until juice is no longer frozen. Then freeze.
To serve: thaw 3-4 hours at room temperature. When thawed add 1 qt of water and the 2 liter of soda. (Opt. to keep cool in punch bowl and add extra flavor, add scoops of sherbet to punch).
NOTE:
To stretch recipe use 1/2 amount of punch mix and same amount of soda and water.

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix punch and champagne together.  Or cider.
Add sherbert before serving, and let melt down just slightly.

name: Holiday Fruit Punch
directions: Combine juices and sugar syrup (see recipe #153600) in punch bowl.  Add ice cubes.  Add chilled gingerale just before serving.  Garnish with thin slices of orange and lemon -- add whole cranberries.
Makes enough for 25-30 cups.

name: Festive Fruit Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, mix lemonade, pineapple juice and orange juice and water. Blend well.
Add ginger ale and ice cubes (and garnishes if you choose) before serving.

name: Double  Apple Punch With a "punch!"
directions: Combine brown sugar, butter or margerine, orange and lemon rind, cinnamon, nutmeg and apple cider in a large pan.
Heat slowly, stiring until mixture just comes to boiling. Adjust flavors if you want and carefully pour into heat-proof bowl (or crockpot set at low) and stir in apple brandy.
Put cinnamon stick in each mug and serve.

name: Lemon Jubilee Punch
directions: Mix and serve over ice.
Garnish with a mint leaf.

name: Sparkling Fruit Punch
directions: Mix ginger ale, pineapple juice, and Kool-Aid in punch bowl.
Cover with a layer of ice.
Enjoy!

name: Sangria
directions: Arrange fruit slices in the bottom of a large punch bowl and sprinkle with sugar.
Pour brandy over fruit. Cover and let stand at least 1 hour.
Add wine and mix well.
Let stand at least 1 hour.
Serve over ice.
Optional: Serve from glass pitcher instead of punch bowl. Beautiful!

name: Party Punch (Kid- Friendly)
directions: In large punch bowl, combine sherbet with pineapple juice.
Add lemon-lime soda.
Place lemon and lime slices on top of punch as a garnish.

name: Best Sangria!
directions: Mix all ingredients; refrigerate until chilled.
Just before serving, add ice.
Garnish with fruit slices.

name: Special Party Punch
directions: In a large bowl, combine gelatin and sugar.
Stir in boiling water until mixture is dissolved.
Stir in pineapple juice and lemon juice concentrate.
Divide into 2 containers, and freeze until solid.
To serve, place gelatin mixture in punch bowl, and chop into pieces.
Pour in ginger ale.

name: Party Punch
directions: Dissolve Jello in boiling water.
Stir in lemonade.
Add cold water and juice.
When ready to serve pour in chilled ginger ale.

name: Cran-Raspberry Party Punch
directions: Pour chilled cranberry juice into a pretty punch bowl.
Add scoopfuls of the raspberry sherbet onto the juice.
Pour chilled lemon-lime soda over both to make punch a bit frothy on top.

name: Easy Holiday Apple Cider
directions: Heat cider and rum in a large pot on the stove or in a slow-cooker.
Mix in other ingredients as mixture warms.
Remove from burner or place slow-cooker on low and serve with a ladle.

name: So. Co. Punch
directions: Pour grenadine into a Jello mold and freeze. Add lemonade, orange juice, lemon juice and Southern Comfort together into a punch bowl. Slice the orange, lemon and lime and put into the bowl. Add the frozen grenadine ice mold. Before serving, add the 7-Up. This punch as a punch!

name: Champagne Punch
directions: In a large pitcher combine sugar and water until sugar is dissolved. I usually use lukewarm water to help the sugar dissolve quicker.
Add all the juices and stir. Add ginger ale and champagne and stir. Chill atleast 2 hours before serving.

name: Church Lady Ice Tea Punch
directions: Pour dry cup of Iced Tea Mix into bottom of punch bowl.
Add 3 liters of Ginger Ale.
Stir.
Add bag of ice.
Enjoy - it's really amazing and refreshing!

name: Sherbet Punch
directions: place sherbet in punch bowl.
pour juice ans soda over sherbert.
spoon juices over sherbet throughout to make the punch creamy.
the sherbet will keep punch chilled, but you can chill the juice and soda prior and mix the punch up an hour before the party and it should be grrrreat!

name: Strawberry Pineapple Punch (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: In a food processor or blender, puree the strawberries.
Pour into a large punch bowl.
Stir in the pineapple juice and soda.

name: Strawberry Daiquiri Punch
directions: Remove stems and caps from fresh strawberries--thaw frozen berries after measuring and do not drain.
Place strawberries half at a time in a blender--cover, blend until smooth.
Transfer all blended berries to a large pitcher and stir in limeade and pineapple juice.
Cover and chill until serving. Just before serving, stir in the Sprite and the ice.
Serve in a punch bowl and add fresh strawberries as decoration if you wish.

name: Green Punch
directions: Mix first 5 ingredients together and chill.
Just before serving  pour punch base into a punch bowl and add the chilled gingerale.

name: Strawberry-Lime Punch
directions: Mix juices together until sugar is disolved.
Add strawberries.
Slowly add lemon-lime soda to pitcher.
Garnish glasses with fresh fruit slices.

name: White Sangria
directions: In a large bowl or pitcher combine brandy and sugar. Let stand 5 minutes; stir to dissolve sugar.
Prepare fruits: Halve peaches, pit peach and slice thinly.
Cut honeydew in half, remove seeds, remove rind and slice into thin slices similar in size to peach sections.
Add fruit and wine to brandy mixture.
Just before serving add seltzer or club soda, stir again.
Serve over a full glass of ice.
Serve over ice.

name: Non-Alcoholic Wassail
directions: Mix and heat everything together in a pot on the stove, or use a Crockpot for convenience.
Add as much spices as you think is necessary. I like my wassail with lots of cinnamon.
You may choose to use ground cloves instead of whole cloves.
Add a splash of rum if alcohol is desired.

name: Sparkling Punch
directions: Combine the first 3 ingredients; cover and chill until cold (a few hours).
Stir in ginger ale just before serving.
Garnish with lemon slices.

name: Light Party Punch
directions: Refrigerate ingredients prior to preparation.
Combine ingredients in a large punch bowl.
Don't add ice as it will dilute the punch and cause the fizz to escape.

name: Strawberry Punch
directions: In a punch bowl, combine the first four ingredients. Add ice cream; stir gently.
Add ginger ale; stir gently. Serve immediately.

name: Hot Cranberry Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
Simmer, stirring occasionally, until candies are dissolved.

name: Fruit Punch
directions: Combine fruit juices, sugar and mint.
Chill thoroughly.
Just before serving, add ginger ale, soda water and strawberries.
Pour over ice ring in punch bowl.
If desired, float thin slices of lemon and lime.

name: Orange Drink 3 (Sangria)
directions: In a large serving bowl, combine all the ingredients except the Cherry 7Up and ginger ale, and mix well. Refrigerate overnight.
Immediately before serving, mix in the Cherry 7Up and ginger ale.
Serve over Ice.

name: Super Fruity Sangria
directions: Pour wine in the pitcher.
Squeeze lemon, orange, and lime in the pitcher.
Dump in the lemon, orange, and lime wedges, to the wine.
Add the sliced peaches, strawberries, lemonade/limeade, sugar ,and brandy.
Chill overnight.
Add ginger ale and ice just before serving.

name: Pink Punch
directions: Mix sugar, kool-aids and a little water to dissolve.
Add rest of ingredients.
Add ice cubes before serving.

name: Hurry up Sangria
directions: Cut the orange, lemon and lime halves into chunks. Place the citrus chunks into a 1 liter pitcher with the marichino cherries. I like to mash the fruit with a wooden spoon to get more juice and pulp into the drink.
Add the wine, orange juice and grenadine and stir. This tastes great served right away.

name: Champagne Sherbet Punch
directions: Mix all except for sherbert, then add it to the top.

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients together and cool.

name: Happy Punch
directions: Prepare orange juice and lemonade as stated on cans.
Mix together with cranberry juice and ginger ale.
Serve.

name: Cranberry Raspberry Punch
directions: In a blender, combine the strawberries, lemonade concentrate and cranberry raspberry concentrate.  Cover and process until smooth.
Transfer to a punch bowl, then stir in ginger ale and club soda.  Top with scoops of sherbet and serve immediately.

name: Vodka Punch Base
directions: Boil water and sugar together until sugar is completely dissolved.
Let cool, then add: orange juice concentrate, kool-aid and vodka. You may add more vodka if you wish.
To serve, mix 50/50 with 7UP or Sprite.
Freezes  well, if you have any leftover.
We used to change colors and flavors to fit the season =D.

name: Sparkling Strawberry Spritzer
directions: Place strawberries in container of an electric blender; cover and process until smooth.  Combine strawberry puree, grape juice, and sparkling water in a large pitcher; stir well.
Serve immediately.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: For ice ring, fill a 6-cup ring mold half full of water; freeze until firm (about 4 hours). Cut 3 orange slices in half; arrange atop frozen ice layer. Garnish with whole cranberries and lemon leaves. Add enough water to just cover the oranges, cranberries, and lemon leaves. Freeze until firm (about 2 hours).
In a large punch bowl combine white grape juice and cranberry juice concentrate. Just before serving, stir in lemon-lime carbonated beverage. Add ice ring. Makes 30 (4-ounce) servings.
Make Ahead Tip: Freeze ice ring up to 3 days ahead.

name: Homemade Lemonade
directions: First take the lemons and use a lemon juicer  to make lemon juice.
Then pour the water in to the pitcher and then do the same with the lemon juice.
Pour in the sugar and ice and mix.

name: Kentucky Tea Punch
directions: Combine water and sugar in saucepan, and cook to form syrup.
Remove saucepan from heat; cool.
Combine all juices and tea.
Add syrup, and mix well.
Chill until ready to serve.
Pour mixture into large container, and add ginger ale when ready to serve. Garnish with lemon and orange slices.

name: Banana Crunch Punch
directions: Boil water and sugar.
Cool and add to juices.
Blend in blender bananas -- mix all ingredients and freeze.
Thaw 4 hours before using.
Just before serving,add seven 28 ounce bottles of chilled lemon-lime drink.

name: Pink Sangria
directions: In a pitcher, combine all the ingredients except the soft drink and ice cubes.
Refrigerate for 1 hour.  Add the soft drink and ice just before serving.

name: Fruit Tea Punch
directions: Pour lemonade into a jug. Cover and freeze for 2 to 3 hours or until semi-frozen.
Place tea bags in a heatproof jug. Pour over boiling water. Brew for 5 minutes. Discard tea bags. Allow tea to cool.
Pour tea into a large jug. Add pineapple juice, orange juice, semi-frozen lemonade and strawberries. Serve.

name: Christmas Carol Punch
directions: Core and slice apples.
In a crock pot combine all ingredients.  Cook on high for 4 hours.

name: Grape Punch
directions: Combine both juices in a large bowl or pitcher.
Mix well.
Stir in soda just before serving.

name: Melon Rum Punch
directions: Combine guava nectar, pineapple juice, rum, grenadine, lime juice and bitters in a large pitcher. Chill. Just before serving, add orange or lime slices, watermelon and cherries to pitcher. Serve over ice.

name: Christmas Punch
directions: Put cider in large coffee maker.
In basket add sugar, red hots and cinnamon sticks.
Perk and serve hot.

name: Party Punch
directions: In small saucepan, bring water and sugar to a boil over high heat.
Cook for approximately 5 minutes, or until sugar is dissolved.
Remove from heat and whisk in gelatin.
Stir for 2 minutes, or until completely dissolved.
Add pineapple juice.
Let cool to room temperature.
Just before serving, pour mixture into a punch bowl or other serving container.
Add carbonated beverage and sherbet.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: Prepare the frozen fruit ice first. Spread oranges, lime, lemon, strawberries and raspberries on baking sheet. Freeze for 4 hours or until firm.
Combine juices and corn syrup in 2-quart pitcher. Stir until corn syrup dissolves. Refrigerate 2 hours or until cold. Stir in ginger ale or grape juice  just before serving.
Divide frozen fruit ice between 8 glasses. Fill glasses with punch. Garnish, if desired. Serve immediately.
Preparation time does not include refrigerating or freezing time.

name: Blonde Sangria
directions: Mix all liquid ingredients with the ice into a punch bowl, then add the fruit.
Stir, serve up, and enjoy, but be careful, it sneaks up on you, but it tastes sooo good!  Also good to add champagne instead of wine.

name: St. Vincent Rum Punch
directions: Mix together all ingredients and splash in a couple of shakes of angstrom bitters, then let sit at room temperature for 3 to 4 days.
Serve over ice.

name: Citrus Grove Punch
directions: In a saucepan, bring sugar and water to a boil; cook for 5 minutes.  Cover and refrigerate until cool.
Combine juices and sugar mixture; mix well.
Just before serving, stir in ginger ale.  Serve over ice.

name: Sparkling Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine the brandy, and orange liqueur.
Pour in the sugar, stir or shake the pitcher thoroughly to mix until the sugar dissolves.
Add all the fruit at once.
Add the sparkling wine and serve as is or on ice.

name: Cranberry Brunch Punch
directions: In a large container, combine all of the ingredients; stir until sugar is dissolved.
Refrigerate until serving.

name: Strawberry Champagne Punch
directions: Dissolve gelatin in boiling water; cool.
In punch bowl, combine gelatin mixture, lemonade comcentrate and cold water.
Just before serving, stir in wine and champagne and strawberries.
* To freeze strawberries, wash and gently pat dry. If desired, leave stems on for color. Arrange in single layer on cookie sheet; freeze until firm.

name: Peach Mango Tea Sangria
directions: Bring water to boil in a medium saucepan.
Remove from heat. Add teabags and allow to steep 2-3 minutes.
Cool completely.
Add sugar, using more or less than the recipe according to your taste. Pour into the pitcher.
Slice and chop the fruit and add it to the pitcher.
Top off the pitcher by adding the white wine.
Allow the flavors to blend in the refrigerator overnight and serve over ice.

name: Non-Alcoholic Mai Tai Punch
directions: In a large pitcher or bowl, combine the fruit juices and the sugar. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
Add the sparkline water and stir gently. Pour into a large punch bowl and add some ice to chill it.
Serve in punch cups.

name: Sparkling Sangria
directions: Combine the first 6 ingredients in a large pitcher and chill for at least 2 hours.  Stir in 1 cup nectar and wine.  Serve immediately.

name: White Wine Sangria
directions: combine all the ingredients in a large pitcher or punch bowl and serve immediately over ice!

name: Sofia's Sangria
directions: Cube apples and orange.
Pour orange juice and wine into pitcher Add the rest of the liquor to desired taste.
Add sugar  ( if orange juice is not as sweet as desired).
Add ice and fruit just before serving.
Mix with wooden spoon and enjoy!
* add more or less of ingredients to taste.

name: Berry Sangria
directions: Combine wine, juice, and 1/2 cup sugar in a serving bowl.
In food processor puree half of strawberries, half of raspberries, and 1/2 cup sugar.  Mix with wine.  If preparing the day ahead stop here.
Slice rest of strawberries and mix with 2 T of sugar.
When ready to serve add sliced strawberries and raspberries and orange slices to wine.
Pour into glasses and serve or serve in punchbowl.

name: Peppy People Punch
directions: Store juices and ginger ale in refrigerator to get the cold before making this.
When ready to serve add juices, ginger ale and 2 quarts if sherbet in punch bowl. Stir to combine. Float remaining pint of sherbert in center.
Note: If you like, at least 12 hours in advance you can slightly melt the pint of sherbert and pour into a mold for a pretty shape in the center of the punch.

name: Lemonade
directions: Squeeze 1/2 lemon into a tall glass.
Add stevia (two little scoops, 28mg each) or a dash into glass. Mix to dissolve the stevia.
Add ice and fill with water. Stir and drink.
I use Pure Stevia extract powder made by Kal. I purchased it at the health food store. Expensive stuff, but it lasts a long time.

name: Fizzy Fruity Lemonade
directions: In a punch bowl, combine lemonade and punch concentrates.
Add ice and club soda to concentrates.
Enjoy!

name: Golden Punch
directions: Mix together the first 4 ingredients until sugar is dissolved. Put in punch bowl add gingerale.
Note- you might have to divide the first 4 ingredients in half and put in punch bowl with 1/2 gingerale. Punchbowls might be too small for the full recipe.

name: Pineapple Lemonade Pizzazz
directions: In a gallon pitcher combine peach nectar, pineapple juice & lemonade concentrate.
Gently stir in carbonated ginger ale & sparkling water, then immediately serve over crushed ice.

name: Cranberry Sangria
directions: Combine ingredients and chill.

name: White Sangria
directions: Mix all ingredients except the soda; refrigerate until well chilled.
Just before serving, stir in the soda.
Garnish with fruit., Lemon, orange and lime slices
Serve over ice.

name: Deliciously Simple-Tastic Orange Party Punch
directions: Prepare orange juice according to package directions; pour into a punch bowl.
Stir in soda and pineapple juice.
Top with scoops of sherbet.
Serve immediately!

name: Sangria! Sangria!
directions: In a large pitcher or bowl, mix together the brandy, lemon juice, lemonade concentrate, orange juice, red wine, triple sec, and sugar. Float slices of lemon, orange and lime, and maraschino cherries in the mixture. Refrigerate overnight for best flavor. For a fizzy sangria, add club soda or ginger ale just before serving.

name: Watermelon Punch
directions: Press pulp through fine sieve.
Boil 3 cups water, sugar and lime juice together for 3 minutes.
Cool; add watermelon juice, orange juice and 2 cups water.
Serve with ice cubes.

name: Crystal Clear Punch With Fruit Cubes
directions: While fruit is still frozen, dice into small pieces. Work carefully yet quickly to keep fruit in a frozen state.
Place a few bits of frozen fruit bits into each of the ice molds/trays. Pour enough chilled white grape juice to fill trays. Pour into mini muffin tins or ice trays and freeze solid.
Once fully frozen, place in a large Ziploc bag until needed.
When ready to serve, mix remaining bottle of white grape juice and ginger ale into a punch bowl. Add frozen fruit cubes and serve.

name: Aunt Diane's Punch
directions: Mix all together can leave out lime vodka.  Add can of chunk pineapple and marachino cherries.  Serve in punch bowl with ladle.

name: Cheerwine Holiday Party Punch
directions: Chill Cheerwine, ginger ale, and pineapple juice thoroughly.
In a large punch bowl, mix all three.  Serve immediately.

name: Holiday Wassail With Alcohol
directions: In one saucepan, heat: 1 gallon unfiltered apple cider and 2 cups baked (peeled apples) cut into medium small pieces
In another saucepan, boil for 5 minutes: water, sugar, nutmeg, ginger, mace, cloves, allspice berries and cinnamon sticks.
In another saucepan, boil: cream sherry and brandy.
In a small mixing bowl, mix until firm - stiff but not dry: 3 egg whites.
In a large mixing bowl – mix until creamy: 3 egg yokes – light in color.
Now fold egg whites into egg yokes and add spice mixture a little at a time, stirring constantly.
Next add booze
Next add cider mixture.

Serve warm. I’ve served it in a punch bowl and in a large pot on the stove. Right before serving, I usually take out the allspice berries and cloves so people don’t choke on them. If I find out that the wassail has cooled down, I re-heat it.

name: Strawberry Champagne Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine champagne, ginger ale and strawberries.  Stir gently and serve.

name: Sangria 22
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large pitcher, at least 1 day ahead of time and place in the refrigerator.
Stir well before serving and pour into wine glasses.
Garnish with orange, lemon, and lime wheels.

name: Hot Cranberry Tea Cider
directions: Place tea bags in boiling water and steep for 10 minutes.  You want strong tea here.
Add the remaining ingredients and heat through.
Simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve warm.

name: Plant Punch
directions: Pour all ingredients except alcohol and grenadine into a glass filled with ice. Stir until glass is frosted. Add Jamaica rum and light rum and stir. Top with Triple Sec and grenadine. Add and orange and pineapple wedge on top. Serve with a straw.

name: Vampire Punch
directions: Put all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Add ice cubes just before serving.

name: Hot Spiced Holiday Punch
directions: Combine apple cider, cranberry-raspberry juice, raspberries, brandy, brown sugar, cinnamon, ginger, cloves and allspice in a 4- to 5-quart Dutch oven; bring to a boil.  Reduce heat, cover, and simmer 15 minutes.
Strain punch through a sieve lined with cheesecloth.
To serve, return punch to Dutch oven.  Add apple wedges.  Cover and heat until boiling.
Pour hot punch into a heatproof bowl or transfer to crockpot.  Serve in heatproof cups, floating an apple wedge in each serving.

name: Red Punch
directions: Heat jello, water, and sugar until clear and dissolved.
Add lemon juice and pineapple juice.
Freeze.
To serve:  Remove from freezer 2 hours before serving.  Break into a slush.  Add ginger ale.

name: Spiced Hot Rum Punch
directions: Into a microwave safe mug, pour the apple cider, orange juice and the rum.
Stir in the sugar and add the cinnamon stick and clove.
Heat in microwave on HIGH setting for 2 1/2* minutes (*please note: use caution here, as all microwaves are different- - your drink may be hot in only one minute!), until hot.
Remove the spices and discard.
Serve hot with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice, and an orange slice for garnish.

name: Cranberry Tea Hot Punch
directions: Make strong tea with 8 teabags and 4 cups of boiling water.
Add cranberry juice, apple cider and spices.
Simmer gently for 5 mins with lid on pot.
Add sugar.
Stir until the sugar dissolves.
Remove cloves and cinnamon stick.
Serve in mugs with a cinnamon stick in each.
Garnish with orange slices.

name: Our Favorite Punch
directions: Dump it all together and mix well.
We cut up fresh lemons, limes, and oranges to float.
I will make fill a jello ring up with the punch and put cherries and slices of the fruit in the ring and freeze to float.

name: Sparkling Party Fruit Punch
