directions: Mix all liquids with sugar.  Add Welch's White Grape Juice Cocktail last and pour slowly.  Stir well.  Add ice ring and garnish with the orange slices and grapes.
(Note: You can also put the fruits in the ice ring when it is just a bit "slushy," and then freeze the entire ice ring with the fruit in it.

name: Top Rated Rum Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Chill.
Enjoy!

name: Christmas Cranberry Punch
directions: Mix the Orange and Cranberry juices in a bowl.
Slowly pour in the lemon-lime pop into the bowl trying not to
make too many bubbles.
Float the whole cranberries on the top of the punch.

name: New Year's Day Punch
directions: Place the lemon peels in a bowl and pour the boiling tea over them.  Squeeze the lemon juice over the sugar.  When the tea is cool, strain out the lemon peels and combine with the sugar-lemon juice.  Add the rum.  If you wish you can stop here and bottle this mixture which will keep in a cool place indefinitely.  When ready to serve the punch, add the gin and the sparkling water.  Serve over a large block of ice or 1 quart of crushed ice, if desired.

name: Mulled Fruit / Tea Puncher
directions: Steep tea bag, cinnamon and cloves in water to make 1 cup of spiced black tea.
In a pitcher, combine sugar and spiced tea.
Stir until sugar isdissolved.
Stir in orange juice, pineapple juice and lemonade.
Chill in refrigerator for 4 hours.
To serve, pour chilled mixture into a punch bowl and stir in ginger ale.

name: Cranberry Cornucopia Sangria
directions: Quarter the orange with the peel on, then cut each quarter into 3 chunks. Core the apples and cut into 1/2-inch chunks. Coarsely chop the cranberries in a food processor or by hand.

Place the chopped cranberries and the orange chunks into a 3-quart or larger pitcher. Add the orange liqueur and muddle the fruit in the triple sec with a cocktail muddler or a wooden spoon to release the juices. Add the apples and mix to blend with other fruit. Cover and macerate the fruit for at least 2 hours, and up to 24 hours.
Just before serving, add the chilled wine and the sparkling cider. Stir to mix. Serve in glasses of your choice, making sure to get some fruit into every serving.

name: Fizzy Holiday Party Punch
directions: Combine the pineapple juice, the undiluted orange juice concentrate and the jello powder.  Mix well and chill.  Just before serving, add the ginger ale.

name: Banana Punch
directions: In a blender or food processor, cover and process the bananas, orange juice and lemonade until smooth. Remove half of the mixture and set aside. Add 1-1/2 cups warm water and 1 cup sugar to blender; blend until smooth. Place in a large freezer container. Repeat with remaining banana mixture, water and sugar; add to container. Cover and freeze until solid.

One hour before serving, remove punch base from freezer. Just before serving, place in a large punch bowl. Add pineapple juice and soda; stir until well blended. Garnish with orange slices if desired. Yield: 60-70 servings (10 quarts).

name: Holiday Spiced Fruit Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients EXCEPT ginger ale and Captain Morgan's Rum.
Let chill overnight or at least 3 hours.  Strain.
Add ginger ale and the rum.
Pour into punchbowl.  Add frozen ring or ice cubes.
Garnish with slices of orange and lemon.

name: Classic Clear Punch
directions: Pour everything into a punch bowl and serve.
There are two other variations of white cranberry juice- one with strawberry, one with peach- these both add a lovely blush of color to your punch!

name: Tropical Punch
directions: Combine ingredients in large jug.
Stir and serve over crushed ice in glasses.

name: Cranberry Sangria
directions: Combine water, sugar, cinnamon, allspice, cloves and star anise in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and cool to lukewarm. Strain through a fine-mesh strainer into a 3-qt container with a tight-fitting lid. Discard solids.
Add cranberries, apples, Cointreau and port to container. Seal and refrigerate at least 4 hours, or up to overnight.
Add wine, port, Cointreau and cranberry juice to container. Stir well, refrigerate until cold, and serve over ice.

name: Strawberry Sangria
directions: Stir Strawberry Wine, soda, orange juice, 8 lime slices, 8 lemon slices, orange slices, Fortified Wine, sugar, Cointreau, grenadine, lemon juice, and lime juice in large pitcher to combine. Let stand 30 minutes.
Fill 8 large wineglasses with ice cubes. Divide sangria mixture among glasses. Garnish each glass with remaining lime and lemon slices and serve.

name: Raspberry Lemonade Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine raspberry lemonade concentrate, water and lime juice.
Stir in lemon-lime soda and crushed ice.
Garnish each glass with a fresh raspberry.

name: Golden Glow Punch
directions: Pour the apple juice into a large punch bowl and dissolve the Orange and Lemonade concentrates inches  Stir the ginger ale into the mix and then spoon in sherbet and add ice ring.  Serve immediately.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: In a 1-quart saucepan over high heat, heat cinnamon stick, cloves, and 2 cups water to boiling.
Reduce heat to low and cover and simmer 20 minutes.
Cool slightly.
Cut orange into 1/4 inch thick slices.
Place orange slices on cookie sheet and freeze until firm.
Remove fruit-juice concentrates and sherbet from freezer and let stand at room temperature for 20 minutes to soften.
Strain spice liquid into punch bowl and discard spices.
Stir in 4 cups of ice water.
With wire whisk, stir in softened fruit juice concentrates and sherbet until smooth.
Stir in lemon-lime soft drink.
Float frozen orange slices in punch.
Garnish with mint sprig.

name: Strawberry and Peach Sangria
directions: Mix white wine, Essensia, strawberries, peach liqueur, peaches, orange slices, lemon slices, and strawberry syrup in large pitcher, smashing citrus slices slightly. Let stand at room temperature at least 2 hours or chill up to 4 hours. Serve sangria over ice.

name: Party Punch
directions: Mix all three concentrates together.
Add 2 quarts cold water.
Add ginger ale.
Note - try making ginger ale ice cubes.

name: Winning Tea Punch
directions: In punch bowl, combine instant tea, water, and juices. Just before serving, add ice.

name: Tropical White Sangria
directions: Do not open bottles of wine or seltzer until ready to serve.
Place slices of lemon, orange and lime in a large sangria pitcher and dust with the granulated sugar.
Lightly mash with a wooden spoon until fruit begins to break down and sugar begins to dissolve.
Cover fruit with pineapple juice. Quarter 3 of the pineapple slices and add to pitcher.
Add remaining fruit and peach schnapps. Stir lightly, then refrigerate for 4 hours.
Right before serving, add seltzer and bottle of wine to pitcher. Be sure each glass gets some fruit! Garnish with orange or kiwi slices and serve with fruit-juice ice cubes.

name: Cranberry Ginger Spritzer
directions: Mix together the first seven ingredients.
Add ice and sliced limes.
Wet the rims of the glasses with one of the sliced limes for garnish, and dip in granulated sugar.

name: Creamy Strawberry Punch
directions: In a large pitcher or punch bowl, combine the milk, ice cream and lemonade concentrate until smooth. Stir in ginger ale; serve immediately.

name: Party Time Punch
directions: Combine pineapple mango juice, concentrate, water and carbonated water in punch bowl. Garnish with fruit, if desired.

name: Pretty Party Punch
directions: Combine the Ginger Ale and Hawaiian Punch.
Add scoops of sherbet into punch.
Sprinkle raspberries over top if desired.
Serve immediately!

name: Lemon Ginger Ale
directions: Remove stems from grapes.
Juice the apple and the ginger together, then juice the rest of the fruit.
Pour the juice in a large glass and fill to the top with about a cup of sparkling mineral water.

name: Citrus Tea Punch
directions: Put the mint in a large heatproof pitcher and pour in 6 cups boiling water. Add the tea bags and let steep for 30 minutes. Remove the tea bags, strain out the mint, and stir in the sugar and juices.
Let cool to room temperature and add the vodka (if using). Refrigerate until cold. Stir before serving. Serve over ice, garnished with the sliced lemon.

name: Simple Sangria
directions: Slice the orange and lemon into thin slices. You can also cut them into smaller pieces (wedges) if you wish. Throw out the ends and any seeds.
Pour wine into large pitcher, slightly squeeze fruit juice into the wine. Put fruit into the pitcher.
Add the sugar and brandy.
Stir and chill overnight.
When ready to serve add the ginger ale and stir gently.
Add lemon or orange slices as a garnish (optional).

name: Tropical Lemonade Wine Cooler
directions: In a large pitcher, mix the sugar and lemon juice until sugar is dissolved.
Add the fresh fruit, wine and water.
Stir well, using the spoon to crush some of the fruit to release its juice.
Cover and refridgerate for at least one hour before serving.

name: Pink Lady Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients; stir well.  Serve over ice.

name: Vanilla Citrus Punch
directions: Combine all the juices in a large pitcher.
Split the vanilla bean lengthwise and scrape the seeds into the juice. Stir with a whisk to separate the vanilla seeds.
Cover and refrigerate until chilled, at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, add the ginger ale (or club soda) and serve in ice-filled glasses.

name: Spanish Sangria - 3 Ww Points
directions: Combine the wine, orange juice, pineapple, apple, sugar and lime juice in a large pitcher; stir until the sugar is dissolved. Refrigerate at least 2 hours, up to overnight.
Just before serving, stir in the club soda. Pour sangria into 6 ice-filled glasses, being sure to include some fruit.

name: Nonalcoholic Spanish Sangria
directions: Combine the grape juice, pineapple, apple and lime juice in a large pitcher; stir. Refrigerate at least 2 hours, up to overnight.
Just before serving, stir in the club soda. Pour sangria into 6 ice-filled glasses, being sure to include some fruit.

name: Virgin Sangria
directions: Combine all the ingredients except the soda/sparkling water in a large pitcher.
Stir well, and chill.
Add soda/sparkling water just before serving.
Serve over ice in wineglasses.

name: Tequila Punch
directions: Combine all of the liquid ingredients in a pitcher.
Garnish with the orange slices.
Serve over ice.

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Mix ingredients together and serve with ice.

name: Non-Alcoholic Grape Juice Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine orange juice, sugar, and grape juice.
Add cut fruit and stir until sugar is dissolved.
Refrigerate until cool and add seltzer water soda just before serving.

name: Strawberry Float Punch
directions: Put half the bag of ice into the punch bowl.
Add ginger ale.
Add a half gallon of ice cream and stir to mix.  Taste mixture and add another half gallon of strawberry ice cream if desired.
Make sure you don't let the punch foam while adding the ice cream.

name: Ginger Lemonade
directions: Mix the 1/2 cup of water with the ginger and squeeze through a strainer to get ginger concentrate.
Add the sugar and the lime juice to this. Stir well till all the sugar dissolves.
Adjust the sugar if you need to. Pour it into bottles and refrigerate.
To serve, add a teaspoonful of this concentrate to each cup of chilled water or Sprite and mix well.
Serve over ice in a goblet garnished with a mint leaf.

name: Barbadian Rum Punch
directions: Peel orange, mango, banana and papaya, remove seeds, and cut into very small dice.
Mix pineapple juice, rum, molasses, and the juice from the limes, and add vanilla pods.
Add diced fruit.
Place drink in fridge for several hours.
Do not forget to remove vanilla pods before serving.
Serve ice cold in long glasses, and enjoy!

name: Luscious Slush Punch
directions: In a large saucepan, combine sugar, water and strawberry  gelatin.
Boil for 3 minutes.
Stir in pineapple juice, lemon juice and orange juice.
Divide mixture in half and freeze in 2 separate containers.  I used storage bags.
When ready to served, place the frozen contents of one container in a punch bowl and stir in 1 bottle of lemon-lime soda until slushy.

name: Rhubarb Lemonade
directions: Add water, rhubarb, sugar, lemon zest, and vanilla to a saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Stir in 1 cup of strawberries and bring to a boil again. Let the mixture cool. Strain through a sieve. Stir in the remaining cup of sliced strawberries and a cup of lemon juice. Pour over ice and enjoy.

name: Watermelon Berry Lemonade
directions: In blender, combine half of the watermelon, strawberries, and lemonade concentrate. Cover and blend until smooth. Move  to a serving container. Repeat with remaining. Add water; chill up to 2 days.
Serve over ice with watermelon wedges and strawberries.
Makes 12 servings.
Make-Ahead.
Make up to 2 days ahead; cover and refrigerate. To serve, stir and add berries and watermelon wedges.

name: Healthy Sangria
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in a large pitcher.
Let chill in refrigerator for 1 hour.
Stir in seltzer/club soda, and pour into ice-filled glasses. Enjoy!

name: Banana Smash Punch
directions: Mix together and freeze in several small containers.
Pour 7-up over the frozen mixture and serve as a slush punch.

name: Econo Punch
directions: Mix together and add enough water to make one gallon (can be slightly frozen).
Serve half of the gingerale per 1/2 gallon mixture.

name: Lemon Lime Sangria
directions: Slice and seed lemons and limes crosswise.
In a bowl combine lemons, limes, sugar and salt, let stand for 1 hour.
Pour fruit into serving pitcher; add lemoncello, vodka, Cava wine and ice, stir to blend.
(stand time - 1 hour).

name: Cranberry Ginger Spritzer
directions: Mix together the first seven ingredients.
Add ice and sliced limes.
Wet the rims of the glasses with one of the sliced limes for garnish, and dip in granulated sugar.

name: Quick and Easy Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Prep can of lemonade as directed. (Make sure there is at least an inch of extra room in the pitcher to add the strawberries).
Cut ends off the strawberries and place them in a blender; I like to leave a few behind so I can slice them up and add them into the lemonade for garnish.
Pour in 2-3 cups of lemonade to the blender.
Blend strawberries with the lemonade to desired consistancy.  Some like it chunky and others like it smooth.
Add the blended strawberries and sugar (to taste) to the rest of the pitcher and stir well.
This recipe works great for fresh raspberries and blackberries also!
Refrigerate and serve!

name: Cranberry and Orange-Sherbet Punch
directions: Bring water and cranberries to a boil in a large pot. Reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes. Strain into a large punch bowl, pressing gently on solids. Discard solids. Add granulated sugar, stirring until sugar dissolves. Cover, and refrigerate for up to 1 day.
Thread several cranberries onto each of 12 small skewers. Brush with egg white, and sprinkle with superfine sugar. Let dry on a nonstick baking mat.
Add club soda, and vodka if using, to bowl. Top with sherbet, and serve with cranberry skewers.

name: Citrus Slush:  Snazzy & Jazzy
directions: In a large container (5 qt ice cream pail works well), dissolve sugar and gelatins in boiling water.  Stir in juices, drink mix and water.   Cover and freeze; stirring several times (set the oven timer if that helps you remember like it does me!).
One hour before serving:  remove from freezer; stir or use a fork to kind-of scrape it up -- frequently to assist the mixture to become slushy.
Just before serving:   scoop out 9 cups of slush into a punch bowl; stir in 1 liter of soda, then repeat with remaining slush and soda.
OR scoop about 1 cup of slush into a large glass, cover with ginger ale or 7-Up or Ruby Red Squirt or regular Squirt.  Yum.
OR for the bachelorette party:   Add a jigger of your favorite hard-liquor (try brandy) before pouring in the ginger ale or 7-Up.   Bottoms' Up!

name: Brunch Punch
directions: Combine first three ingredients.
Refrigerate.
Stir in ginger ale just before serving.

name: Citrus Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Juice all citrus into a 1.5 gallon container. Add remaining ingredients except sugar. Check flavor and add sugar until you feel you have reached the proper sugar amount. Garnish with a mint sprig or strawberry ice ring if desired.

name: White Peach Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine dry white wine, peach brandy or vodka, lemonade concentrate and sugar. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Add sliced peaches, red and green grapes.
Refrigerate sangria until well chilled, at least 2 hours, or overnight to blend flavors. Serve over ice, and use a slotted spoon to include sliced peaches and grapes with each serving.

name: Celebration Punch
directions: Combine pineapple juice, soda, thawed fruit concentrate and, if desired, fruit slices in a bowl.
Serve, placing slices of fruit on the rim of the glass (optional).

name: Fruit Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients, except gingerale, until dissolved and thawed.
Add gingerale just before serving.

name: Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher or punch bowl, combine the two frozen juice mixes and 3 cans of water.  Add in the entire bottle of red wine and juice from your lemon.  Add in as much soda/pop as it takes to fill the rest of your container - usually 1/2 - 3/4 of the bottle.  Add fruit slices and ice, if using and enjoy!

name: Blueberry Sangria
directions: Into a 2-quart pitcher, combine blueberry juice, wine and liqueur, if used. Add orange and lemon slices and fresh blueberries. Chill until ready to serve. Just before serving, stir in soda. Serve in tall glasses over ice cubes, if desired.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: In a 2 (5-gallon) buckets, combine cranberry juice, pineapple juice, orange juice, and almond extract (divided equally among the buckets).
Just before your event, add ginger ale to the mix.

Because the 5-gallon buckets will be too heavy and cumbersome to lift easily, fill a 1-gallon bucket with punch and pour into the punch bowl. Don't fill the bowl to the top - you'll need to add ice. Use the smaller bucket to refill the punch during your event.
Place the sliced oranges into the bowl to allow them to float on top of the punch.
Always add the ice to the punch bowl, not to the buckets.

name: Rhubarb Punch
directions: Bring the rhubarb and strawberries to a boil in the water.
Lower heat, add honey and simmer until soft, about 10-15 minutes. Let cool in the refrigerator.
Once cool, strain the fruit through a sieve draining well (you may reserve the leftover fruit for a sauce or a compote).
Mix the orange and lemon juice with the rhubarb liquid.
Add the ginger ale right before serving. Serve cold over ice.

name: White Sangria
directions: Mix everything togheter in a nice see-through jug.
If the wine you chose is dry add a couple of tablespoons sugar or sweetener.
Let steep in the fridge for at least two hours.
Enjoy!

name: Christmas Punch
directions: Simmer water, sugar and cinnamon together for 10 minute Refridgerate overnight.
Chill juices and soda.
At serving time remove cinnamon sticks and combine juice and syrup.  Add ice cubes and serve.

name: Apple Orchard Punch
directions: in large punch bowl combine apple juice, craanberry cocktail concentrate and ornage juice, stir to dissolve.
slowly add ginger ale or champagne.
vertically, thinly slice apple forming whole apple slices.
float apple slices on top of each punch.

name: Happy Hour Punch
directions: Chill all ingredients.
Mix all in a punch bowl, add champagne last.
Add ice and garnish with orange slices.
Enjoy!

name: Veranda Tea Punch
directions: In a large sauce pan combine the sugar and water.
Boil for ten minutes to make a simple syrup.
cool.
Mix orange juice with syrup.
add the hot tes and allow to cool.
Just before serving add the coke (or ginger-ale if you preffer) and soda water.
Garnish with lemon and orange slices.

name: Sparkling Peach Punch
directions: In large saucepan combine water, sugar, and gelatin. Bring to boiling, stirring to dissolve.

Place undrained peach slices in blender. Cover; blend until smooth. In extra-large bowl combine gelatin mixture, pureed peaches, peach nectar, and lemon juice. Divide peach mixture among four 1-quart containers. Cover and freeze overnight or until firm.
Note: Mixture can be frozen up to 3 months. Use as many containers as needed to continue with Step 3. (Each quart makes 6 servings).

To serve, place one or more containers at room temperature for 1 hour. Break in chunks with large fork. Place in punch bowl or jug. Stir in 2 bottles of ginger ale per container of peach mixture until slushy.

name: White Grape Cooler Punch
directions: In large container, mix juice concentrates. Stir in water.
Just before serving, pour into punch bowl.
Add soda pop and lemon and lime slices.
Pour over ice in glasses.

name: Fruit Juice and Vodka Punch
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients in large bowl. Stir until blended. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, at least 2 hours. (Can be prepared 1 day ahead. Keep refrigerated.).
Mix in ginger ale and serve.

name: Halloween Brew-Ha-Ha Punch
directions: Stir together sugar and 2 quarts water until sugar is dissolved. Stir in remaining ingredients. Chill.
For a scary presentation, place punch bowl into a larger bowl, and add dry ice to larger bowl.

name: Punch
directions: Mix all but the 7-up together in a punch bowl.
Just before serving, stir in the 7-up.

name: Easy Homemade Lemonade
directions: 1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Chill.
3. Enjoy, (you may add 2 slices of lemon if desired for presentation.).

name: Senora Lopez's Sangria
directions: Combine wine, sugar, and fruit in a large punch bowl.
Cover and refrigerate at least 8 hours, or overnight.
Just before serving add peach brandy and sparkling water.

name: Christmas or Anytime Punch
directions: In the container of a blender, process the strawberries until pureed.
In a large punch bowl, combine the pureed strawberries with the seltzer, lemonade, grapefruit juice, and bitters.
Add ice cubes or an ice ring.
Enjoy!

name: Cranberry Punch
directions: Chill juice & soda until time to use.
Scoop sherbet into a large puch bowl.
Add cranberry juice & lemon soda.
Serve immediately.

name: Apple Sunrise Punch
directions: Combine apple and cranberry juices.
Pour over ice in glasses or cups.
Carefully top off with carbonated water.
If desired, add an apple or orange slice to the rim of each glass.

name: Mulled Tea Punch
directions: In a teapot or small heatproof bowl, pour boiling water over tea bags; cover and let stand 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags.
In a large saucepan, combine cranberry juice cocktail, brown sugar, allspice, cloves and cinnamon sticks. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat; simmer for 15 minutes.
Remove spices.
Stir in tea and wine; heat through.
Serve hot in mugs. Garnish with orange slices studded with cloves if desired.

name: Mulled Cider
directions: In a stock pot, combine all the ingredients. Simmer for 30 minutes. cool and strain. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Reheat and serve in mugs.

name: Four-Juice Christmas Punch
directions: Combine frozen concentrates in a punch bowl. (A large soup tureen makes a good substitute.) Thaw, mix well and refrigerate until needed. At serving time, add ginger ale, club soda, water and vodka, if using. Serve with plenty of ice.

name: Holiday Cranberry Punch
directions: In large pitcher stir all ingredients except ice cubes until sugar dissolves. Chill; serve over Cranberry Ice Cubes.
Cranberry Ice Cubes: Half fillk ice cube tray with water; freeze. Add several cranberries and 1/8-inch water to each cube; freeze. Fill tray with water; freeze until needed.

name: Watermelon Punch
directions: Scoop out the pulp of the watermelon and remove the seeds. Liquefy the pulp in an electric blender or force through a sieve. You should have 4 cups of juice. Combine with all the remaining ingredients but the mint and pour over ice into a punch bowl or serve from the watermelon shell. Garnish with the mint.
NOTE: Rum or cognac may be added.

name: Open House Punch
directions: Chill all ingredients. Add 7-UP just before serving. Garnish with orange and lemon slices.

name: Non-Alky Sangria
directions: Place pear, apple, the wedges of one orange, and the wedges of one lemon in a large glass pitcher.
Cut four of the limes in half.  Place the lime halves in the bottom of the pitcher, squeezing slightly to release some of the juice.
Slice the remaining limes into very thin slice wheels.  Place them and the remaining oranges and lemons in a quart size bag.  Place the bag in the refrigerator to chill.
Pour the lemon extract over the fruit in the pitcher.  Pour one of the bottles of the red grape juice over the fruit.  Chill the pitcher several hours.

To serve, place a few slices key lime, one slice of orange, and one slice of lemon (from the refrigerator bag) into a decorative sangria glass.  Pour 2 tablespoons-1/4 cup of ginger ale over the fruit in the glass.  Pour the sangria base from the pitcher to the top of each glass.  Float a soaked apple wedge and pear wedge in each glass.

The remaining bottle of red grape juice can be poured over the remaining fruit in the pitcher.  Pour any juice that has squeezed out of the bagged fruit into the sangria mixture to replenish the base.

name: Party Sangria!
directions: Pour wine into a large pitcher
Squeeze the juice wedges from the lemon, orange and lime into the wine.
Toss in the fruit wedges (leaving out seeds if possible)
Add pineapple, sugar, orange juice and gin
Chill overnight.
Add ginger ale, berries and ice just before serving.

name: Snowball Punch
directions: In a medium saucepan, combine the water and sugar; bring to a boil stirring occasionally.
Remove from stove and add condensed milk and almond extract; stir until combined.  Refrigerate the mixture until ready to use, or it can be divided and frozen for future use at this point as well.
Place milk mixture in punch bowl (the milk mixture should be cold at this point) and add Sprite.  Stir to blend.  Float scoops of vanilla ice cream on top.

name: Real Lemonade
directions: Dissolve sugar in boiling water.
Add lemon rind & juice.
TO SERVE:.
Combine cold water, lemon mixture & ice in a large pitcher.
Stir well.
If desired, garnish each serving with a sprig of fresh mint &/or a cherry.

name: Wedding Punch
directions: Cut orange slices in half.  Line bottom of a 6 1/2 cup ring mold with half of orange slices and cherries. (A Bundt pan works just fine for this although you may need more than 1 liter of ginger ale).
Pour in a thin layer of ginger ale, and freeze until firm.
Arrange remaining orange slices and cherries along side of ring mold, and pour in another thin layer of ginger ale.  Freeze until firm.
Pour in remainder of ginger ale and freeze until firm.
Combine orange juice, pineapple juice, lime juice, and sugar, stirring until sugar dissolves.  Chill mixture. (You can freeze here for use later).
Just before serving, pour chilled juice mixture into punch bowl; add tonic water, champagne or additional ginger ale, and ice ring.
If you freeze the base, let it thaw completely before making the punch.

name: Wedding Fruit Punch
directions: Boil the sugar in the water until it is completely dissolved.
Add the concentrates, stirring until mixed after each one.
Stir in the pineapple juice.
Chill for 2 hours, or overnight.
When ready to serve, add the ginger ale.

name: Favorite Punch
directions: Boil 2 cups sugar and 2 cups water together.
Add 2 quarts water.
Add orange and lemon juice, vanilla, and almond extract. Good served hot or cold.

name: Best-Ever Spanish Sangria
directions: Juice citrus (200-300 mL) into a small saucepan; add sugar, nutmeg, cinnamon stick (snapped up) to juice in saucepan.  Heat liquid, while stirring, until until steam rises.
Pour liquid into a heat proof jug or allow liquid to cool first.
Pour wine into container with brandy.
Add juice/spice mix, stir. Add leaves, crushed and deveined. Chill 24 hours.
You can also add any other fruits you like!  If I add apples or pears, I like to soak them in the brandy overnight before adding them to the sangria. YUM!

similar.name: Summer Spanish Sangria..get the Party Started!

name: Carol's Citrus Sangria
directions: Combine 1st three ingredients and add sliced fruit. Marinate fruit at least 6 hours.
Dissolve sugar in water, cool. Add with orange juice to wine mixture, stir.
Chill at least 2 hours and serve over ice.
Easily multiplied.

name: Rhubarb Punch
directions: blend Rhubarb, Sugar and 2 cups water in food processor until smooth. mix with other juices.

name: Campari Sangria
directions: Mix all ingredients in a pitcher, with ice. Store it in the refrigerator to keep the ice from melting and diluting the Sangria.

name: White Sangria
directions: Slice fruit.  Mix all ingredients, chill for at least one hour prior to serving,.

name: Cranberry-Lime Vodka Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients except lime, ice and cranberries.
For each serving, add a few ice cubes to a champagne flute, squeeze and add a lime wedge.
Fill glass with punch and garnish with a few cranberries.

name: Sangria Blush
directions: 1. Combine orange juice and sugar in small saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved.
3. Pour into pitcher once cooled.
4. Add wine and fruit slices.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours until flavours are blended.
6. Add ice.

name: Tea Punch
directions: make lipton tea as directions state (cold-brew or regular may be used).
Slowly add premade tea to ginger ale, sampling along the way until desired taste is reaced.

name: Cranberry Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, stir together the orange juice, lemon juice, orange liqueur, and brandy.  Stir in the cranberry juice and red wine.  Cover and refrigerate until cold.
To serve, transfer the mixture to a large punch bowl.  Stir in the lemon-lime soda and crushed ice.  Garnish with cranberries and orange slices.

name: Holiday Cranberry Punch (Non-Alcholic)
directions: Divide cranberries between two ice cube trays, fill with water and freeze.
In a large bowl, combine all juices and fruits (not sparkling apple cider).  Chill for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Just before serving add cranberry ice cubes and cider to punch and stir well.  Transfer to a glass decanter or pitcher and serve immediately.

name: Sparkling Fruit Punch
directions: Equipment:
Martini shaker or pint glass.
Shaking tin.
Cocktail strainer.
Preparation:
Do ahead: In blender, purée entire can of tropical fruit salad until smooth. Set tropical fruit purée into a separate bowl/pitcher. Rinse blender bowl and return to base.

To make one drink: In martini shaker, add 3 ounces tropical fruit purée and white cranberry juice. Fill martini shaker with ice, and shake vigorously 12 times. Pour into pint glass; top with ginger ale. Stir gently. Garnish with pineapple wedge.
Tip: Reduce 1 1/2 ounces of white cranberry juice and add 1 1/2 ounces light or spiced rum to turn this into an adult-only treat.
*Note: One, 15-ounce can of tropical fruit salad in natural juices makes 5 drinks.
Serving glass: 16-ounce pint glass.
Servings: 1.

Nutritional Information Per Serving:  Calories 110; Total fat 0g; Saturated fat 0g; Cholesterol 0mg; Sodium 25mg; Carbohydrate 28g; Fiber 1g; Protein 0g; Vitamin A 0%DV**; Vitamin C 70%DV; Calcium 2%DV; Iron 4%DV  **Daily Value.

name: Non-Alcoholic Sangria Punch
directions: Place all of the ingredients except the San Pellegrino and the mint in the blender and pulse a few times until rustically combined.
Transfer to a punch bowl.
Rustically chop the mint in the mini food processor or by hand and then add to the mix.
Chill in the fridge for at least a few hours to allow the flavours to infuse.
Just before serving, add in the San Pellegrino and give it a good stir.
Serve over ice cubes and garnish with fresh mint leaves.

name: Evergreen Punch
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients and stir until sugar and kool-aid is dissolved.
Then add the pineapple juice, gingerale and sprite.  Mix well.
Add the sherbet lastly, and stir until foamy.

name: Holiday Punch
directions: In punch bowl, mix juice then pour in soda water.  Top with scoop of sherbet.

name: Warm Cranberry Punch
directions: Make a spice packet.  Pinch open the cardamon pods to release the seeds and place them or a piece of cheesecloth.  Add the cinnamon and cloves.  Tie up the bundle with string.
Heat the punch.  Pour everything but the Creme de Casis into the crock pot.  Submerge the spice packet in the liquid.  Steep the punch on low in the crock pot for 1 to 4 hours - do not boil.
To serve.  Add the Creme de Casis.  Serve with orange slices for garnish.

name: Rum Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a pitcher or punch bowl.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.
Add ice if desired.
Garnish with nutmeg and orange slices.

name: Sparkling Raspberry Cranberry Punch
directions: Chill the juice cocktail and seltzer. Put the water and drink mix into a large pitcher, stir until the mix is dissolved. Pour drink mix, juice cocktail and seltzer into a punch bowl. Stir in thawed raspberries and juice. If you would like at this point you could top with several scoops of raspberry sherbert.

name: Brunch Punch
directions: Prepare frozen apple juice and lemonade according to directions.
Mix together in large container.
Add almond flavoring.
Place ice in large punch bowl, pour juice over ice and add ginger ale just before serving -- .

name: Serious Sangria
directions: Slice desired fruit into appealingly sized slices/dice.
Mix all and Chill.
Make in advance if possible, it improves with a days' time to mellow.
Watch out, the fruit gets very "intoxicating"!

name: Thick and Rich Party Punch
directions: In large punch bowl, combine juice and milk thoroughly.
Slowly pou in gingerale and stir well.
You will need to mix this punch occassionally to keep the thick ingredients from settling.

name: Sparkling Lime Christmas Punch
directions: Mix frozen juices according to directions on the can (add 7 cans water).
Add Sprite to taste.
Serve in punch bowl -- adding ice cubes and frozen cranberries.

name: Citrus Punch
directions: In 2 large pitchers or a large punch bowl, combine the lemonade, OJ, sugar, vanilla extract & water.
Gently stir in the soda & enjoy!

name: Belize Rum Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a punch bowl or pitcher.

name: White Wedding Punch
directions: Mix juices together.
When ready to serve, pour juices into a punch bowl.
Add 2 scoops of ice cream.
Pour in ginger ale.
Stir gently.

name: Raspberry Lemon Ginger Punch
directions: In a large punch bowl, combine frozen juices with ginger ale and stir until juice is dissolved.
Add ice.
Garnish with sliced orange, lime and strawberries.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Fruit Punch
directions: Mix all the juices together in a pitcher and chill.
Serve over ice and enjoy!

name: Cranberry Punch for Adults
directions: Chill all ingredients. Mix everything together in a punch bowl. Serve cold. Add ice if necessary. (You can add ice to the bowl, or simply put ice cubes in each glass).
Adult Beverage Version: To create a tasty grown-up cocktail, just add vodka or gin to this fruity concoction!

name: Guava Delight Punch (Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Combine sugar and water in a saucepan and simmer 10 minutes; cool.
Combine juices and orange zest in a pitcher and add sugar syrup; chill.
Add ice and ginger ale, before serving.

name: Sweet White Peach Sangria
directions: Place all ingredients in a pitcher and stir to mix.
Refrigerate at least 8 hours or up to 48 hours.

To serve you can add club soda to the entire pitcher, so give the sangria a “fizz”. I prefer to pour about â…“ club soda in a glass filled with plenty of ice, and then pour the sangria. Serve with a slice of fresh orange, for color.

Very refreshing. I recommend keeping extra wine on hand, as my guests wanted more…and more. Chilling this for at least 8 hours is good, but making it at the last minute works fine… color and fruity flavor won’t be as rich, if the drink isn’t chilled quite long enough.

name: Red Sangria
directions: In a pitcher, mix all ingredients except ginger ale and ice.  Let cool 1 hour in the fridge.  Add ginger ale and ice when ready to serve.

name: Sangria
directions: Refrigerate wine, sprite, and brandy. (The colder it is the better, this will keep it colder longer once you serve it.).
Freeze half of the citrus and berries. (I do this instead of adding ice cubes, because they stay colder longer than ice cubes and they don't water down your drink.).
Mix the wine, brandy, and sprite.
Add fruit and stir. Allow to sit for a few minutes.
Add the frozen fruit and serve.

name: Lemonade Ice Ring
directions: In a round mold, place some sliced lemons, oranges and lime rings in the bottom.
Place cherries in the center of the orange rings.
Slowly add lemonade just to cover.
Freeze.
Remove mold from freezer and add more fruit and mint leaves.
Slowly fill with lemonade and freeze again.
Place frozen ice ring in punch.

name: Hot Cranapple Punch
directions: Wrap cinnamon sticks and cloves in cheesecloth and tie off.
Combine all ingredients in crockpot.
Turn on low and let simmer for a minimum of 3 hours.
Remove cheesecloth and stir before serving.

name: Fruity Punch
directions: Mix first 5 ingredients.
Pour into punch bowl. Float scoops of orange sherbet or serve plain over ice.

name: Hot Cranberry Cider Punch
directions: In large pan combine cranberry juice, cider, nectar, spices, orange and lemon peel.
Bring to boil, reduce heat and simmer, uncovered 20-30 minutes.
Remove from heat, strain through a fine-mesh strainer lined with cheesecloth.
Taste punch and sweeten accordingly. Apple Cider and Cranberry Juice vary greatly in sweetness - you may need no sugar, or you may need a little more than listed.

Add rum and butter, stirring until butter melts. Or, if having a non-alcoholic alternative is desirable, hold off on adding the rum to the entire punch and add 1 to 2 tbsp of rum to each mug, then fill to the rim with hot punch.

name: Simply Delicious (And Easy!) Sangria
directions: Slice of up all fruit and add to pitcher or punch bowl.
Add the remaining ingredients and stir.
Drink up!
*Note: If providing for a party, you can freeze fruit + fruit juice (berries + pineapple juice) in a bunt cake dish (or other dish with hole in the middle) and add to bowl to keep sangria cool.

name: Glorious Christmas Punch
directions: Dissolve gelatin in boiling water; stir in lemonade. Add cold water and cranberry juice.
Place two trays of ice cubes in a large punch bowl; pour punch over ice.
Pour in ginger-ale.

name: Perky Punch
directions: In large punch bowl, Columbine the pineapple juice, apricot nectar and lemonade concentrate and mix well until blended.
Just before serving, add the sprint and ice.
Garnish with flowers or mint leaves, if desired.

name: Easy Celebration Punch- Kid Friendly
directions: Take a pitcher and put equal parts ginger ale and fruit punch.
Chill.
Mix sherbet into pitcher to make a foam at top.
Pour into cups, champagne flutes or glasses and add a scoop of sherbet foam to garnish the top.
-OR-.
Take a bowl and put 2 liters of ginger ale and 2 liters fruit punch.
Chill.
Mix in orange sherbet to taste.
Ladle into cups.
Enjoy!

name: Anniversary Punch
directions: Mix fruit juices and sugar together.
Just before serving add ginger ale and carbonated water and sitr well.

name: Mardi Gras Punch
directions: Mix orange juice and lemonade concentrates as directed on can.
Stir in apple juice, ginger ale and, if desired, small scoops of sherbet or ice cubes.

name: White Lightning Sangria
directions: Pour wine and vodka in the pitcher and add sliced grapes, tangerine and pineapple. Next add sugar and stir gently. Chill mixture for at least one hour. Add club soda just before serving.
If you'd like to serve your Sangria right away, use chilled white wine and club soda and serve over lots of ice.
Addition ideas: sliced strawberries, a handful of fresh blackberries, banana slices, a half cup of citrus soda pop.

name: Champagne Punch
directions: Place a frozen ice ring in a punch bowl.
Add the fruit punch, water, strawberries, and juices.
Stir to dissolve the punch.
Slowly pour in the ginger ale and Champagne.

name: Party Punch
directions: Beat cranberries, add juices and chill.
Add Ginger Ale when ready to serve.

name: Rum Punch
directions: Mix all ingredients in a large pitcher.  Chill for 2 hours.
Fill glasses with ice and pour punch over ice.
Garnish with lemon and lime slices and fresh mint leaves.

name: Lemon Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine all ingredients except for the ice, club soda and green grapes.
Chill overnight, before serving, add ice cubes and club soda, stir lightly.
Pour into tall glasses and garnish with the green grapes if desired.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Punch Slush
directions: In a blender container, process 1 cup of water bananas and sugar until smooth.
Pour into a large container and add the lemonade concentrate, orange juice, pineapple juice and remaining water.
Cover and freeze.
Remove from freeze for 2-3 hours.
Just before serving, break up with a large wooden or metal spoon.
Note: If punch is frozen to solid just allow to sit out on counter until is starts to melt and become slushy.

name: Hot Cranberry-Orange Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a slow cooker.
Cover and cook on LOW for 4-6 hours.
Serve hot, straining out the spices.

name: Sangria
directions: Put the caster sugar, lemon juice, orange juice into a large jug or pitcher and stir until sugar is dissolved.
Add the bottle of wine, lemonade, gin and vodka.
Cut the lemon, orange, and lime into halves and remove seeds.  Slice all the fruit thinly.  Core the apple and cut into 1/2 inch dice.
Add the fruit to the pitcher and refrigerate for 1 hour for flavors to meld.
Fill pitcher with ice and serve immediately, making sure to scoop some of the fruit into each glass.

name: White Wine Sangria
directions: Trim off the end and thinly slice half of the lemon; set aside.
Using a vegetable peeler, peel 3 (1 1/2-inch-long) strips of lemon rind off the remaining lemon half and place in a small saucepan.
Add water, cloves and preferably a cinnamon stick; bring to a simmer and cook, covered, 10 minutes.
Remove from heat, add the tea bags and steep 5 minutes.
Remove tea bags, pressing well to extract tea; discard bags.
Refrigerate tea mixture until well chilled, at least 1 hour.
Combine wine and tea mixture in a large pitcher.
Stir in sugar, to taste.
Add strawberries, orange, lime and reserved lemon slices; refrigerate at least 1 hour or up to 48 hours.; just before serving, stir in the club soda.
Serve in chilled glasses over ice, spooning in some of the fruit with the sangria.

name: Classic Sangria
directions: Add sliced orange, lemon and sugar to a large pitcher.
Mash until juice is released but fruit is not crushed.
Stir in orange juice, Triple Sec and wine.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours but 8 is best.
Stir and serve with ice.

name: Holiday Punch
directions: Take your punch bowl and fill it with ice.
Add remaining ingredients and stir.

name: Easy Peasy Sangria
directions: Combine chilled ingredients (except the soda) at least 1 hour before serving, but best prepared and stored overnight in the refrigerator.
When you are ready to serve, add the chilled lemon lime soda and ice and stir gently.
If you would like pieces of fruit and ice in your glass can pour out of the side of the pitcher.
Salud!

name: Cherry Sprite Punch
directions: Combine cherry juice, Sprite, and ginger ale in punch bowl.
Microwave juice concentrate for 30 seconds to melt it to a slushy consistency, then add to bowl.
Stir.
Serve immediately.

name: Green Tea Punch
directions: Combine the green tea, orange juice, pineapple juice and ginger ale in a punch bowl and mix well.
Mix in the pineapple and small scoops of the sherbet.  Serve.

name: Apple Lemon Punch
directions: Heat and mix all ingredients except the cloves and lemon slices.
Place one clove and one slice of lemon into each cup. Wait for any froth to rise to the top of the mixture and dispense over the lemon slices.

name: Spiced Fruit Punch
directions: Heat and mix the ingredients.
Wait for any froth to rise to the top and dispense into cups.

name: Sangria Punch
directions: Empty lemonade mix into a large pitcher.  Stir in juices until dissolved.  Refrigerate until ready to serve.  At serving time, stir in club soda and sliced fruit.

name: African Punch
directions: Blend the fruits, vodka, triple sec and gin in a blender until smooth. Add the grenadine, port, wine, pineapple and orange juice, and blend until just combined.
Divide into 4 high-ball glasses over ice and top with lemonade.

name: Halloween Punch Recipe
directions: In a saucepan, bring 1 cup of pineapple juice to a boil. Stir in gelatin until dissolved. Cool; transfer to a large pitcher or container. Add orange juice and remaining pineapple juice. Chill.
Just before serving, pour into a punch bowl; add ginger ale and mix well. Top with scoops of sherbet. Yield: 20-24.

similar.name: Non-Alcoholic  Punch - Great for New Year's Eve

name: Pina Colada Punch
directions: In a blender blend together, in batches if necessary, the cream of coconut, the pineapple juice, and the rum and transfer the punch to a large pitcher.
Stir in the ice cubes and garnish the punch with the pineapple wedge.
Garnish each drink with a pineapple wedge.

name: Peach Pineapple Champagne Punch
directions: Stir together juice, nectar, and 2 Celsius water. Add champagne; stir gently.
If desired, garnish with orange and lemon slices.

name: Rum and Pineapple Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a punch bowl.
Chill at least 4 hours or overnight.

name: Party Yum Punch
directions: Place sherbet in punch bowl.(and if you cant find strawberry you can use rasberry).
Pour in fruit punch and Sprite soda.
And stir .
And the sherbet should serve as punch chiller but if you want u can add ice.

name: Sparkling Christmas Punch
directions: Boil 2 cps water and 1 cp sugar until dissolved. divide between 2- gallon size pitchers.
Divide orange juice (no pulp) and pink lemonade between both pitchers. Do not add the water the container directions ask for to make that particular drink.
Divide pineapple juice between both containers then the ginger ale.
Refrigerate over nite.

name: Cranberry-Apple Punch
directions: heat water and sugar to boiling, stirring constantly till sugar is dissolved.
Chill sugar water, tea, and juices.
Just before serving, combine sugar water, tea and juice in a large punch bowl.

name: Rose Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in punch bowl.
serve immediately.

name: Creamy Rose Punch
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in punch bowl.
Add scoops of raspberry serbert to bowl.
Serve immediately.

name: Tahitian Punch
directions: Combine juices in punch bowl.
Add sprite.
Add scoops of sherbert.
serve immediately.

name: Sparkling Cranberry Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large punch bowl.
Serve immediately.

name: Fruit Glow Punch
directions: Combine first 4 ingredients in punch bowl.
Add scoops of sherbet to bowl.
Serve immediately.

name: Punch a La Koets
directions: In small saucepan, heat water and sugar till sugar dissolves.
Cool then combine with pineapple juice, banana and concentrates.
Pour into freezer containers; cover and freeze.
Remove from freezer about one hour before serving.  Thaw to slush stage; turn into punch bowl.
Slowly pour ginger ale down side of bowl.
Decorate top of punch with thinly sliced fresh lemons, if desired.

name: Christmas Morning Punch
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher.  .
Serve cold.

name: Strawberry Rosé Sangria
directions: In a large pitcher, combine wine, vodka, and 1/2 of the strawberries.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or up to 6.
Just before serving, add ginger ale, the rest of strawberries and gently stir.
Serve over ice with strawberry garnish.
